Starting from the aggressive attack of the RRTS Special Operations Squadron to the moment they dropped like flies, it took only three to five minutes. The special forces that were known as the most elite in the movie were all gone!

“Ah...”

The captain raised his head from the pilot’s seat with blood on his face. He was very lucky because the pilot had done everything to stabilize the helicopter, plus he had been sitting in the cockpit. At this time, he was just dizzy from the impact, but he did not suffer fatal injuries.

“Bob!”

He turned his head to look at the pilot’s seat but saw that the pilot was as limp as a torn burlap sack. The other man was dead beyond rescue and even his spine was broken into several pieces.

“D*mn...”

The captain cursed. He turned and looked back again, only to see the same situation in the back. Even the blade of the helicopter’s propeller had slashed into the passenger compartment, cutting the hapless special soldiers into halves.

A bloody smell mixed with the stench of gasoline filled the air...

Knowing that he could not stay here any longer, the captain pressed the emergency button to open the door and the hatch beside him suddenly popped open. Then, he unfastened his seat belt and staggered down from the helicopter.

“Cough, cough, cough...”

There was a burning pain in the chest. The captain coughed violently as he climbed out of the helicopter. Then, he looked forward with blood on his face. At this moment, he saw the mysterious man, covered in unknown armor with six sights floating behind him, descending from the sky and standing directly in front of him.

“Hum...”

With a low sound of energy charging, six sights with red lights aimed at him.

“Who on Earth are you?”

The captain sat down on the ground, looking at the “monster” in front of him with a bewildered expression.

“We come for peace.”

However, what he did not expect was that the “monster” in front of him spoke. The other party’s voice was low and unique, with a strange echo. “We come from another civilization. The purpose of our coming here is just to retrieve what belongs to us.”

“What belongs to you?”

The captain was puzzled. He looked straight at the opponent’s streamlined mask. “What is it then?”

“Ark.”

The “monster” said indifferently, “The Ark is the product of our stay on the earth and now we have to retrieve it, that’s all.”

“What?”

Hearing this, the captain suddenly displayed an incredulous look. “Impossible, the Ark is a legacy left by an ancient Martian civilization, how could...”

Before he finished, he stopped himself.

He had already thought about where the mysterious monster in front of him came from...

“That’s right, we’re what you call the ‘Martian civilization’.”

The “monster” suddenly laughed lowly. “You thought we were dead, right? But unfortunately, we didn’t die out but left the solar system and settled around Orion and the Pleiades.”

Hearing such explosive news, the captain was completely speechless. He just kept shaking his head and muttering in a low voice, “Impossible, absolutely impossible...”

“That’s the truth.”

The “monster” suddenly turned his head and looked at the transceiver on the captain’s chest. “Humans on the other side, have you heard? We didn’t intend to hurt anyone. We just want to get back what belongs to us.”

As if waking up from a dream, the captain quickly took off the transceiver on his chest, only to see that a red light was flashing. It was connected to the headquarters line.

“Martian civilization?”

At this moment, an old voice suddenly came from the transceiver and that voice solemnly said, “Do you have evidence? How should we trust you?”

“Of course, I have evidence.”

The “monster” said casually, “Although we’ve been away for a long, long time, we still know everything that your human civilization has done. In particular, at this time in the laboratory of Mars — the Olduvai Research Facility — aren’t you experimenting with our legacy?”

“Legacy? You mean?”

The voice in the transceiver was suspicious.

“The C24 chromosome.”

Although the tone of the “monster” was calm, what he said suddenly silenced the voice in the transceiver. He only heard the “monster” say, “You’re experimenting with death row prisoners using the ‘C24’ technology we left behind to create superhuman beings that are resistant to poison and possess extremely high IQ and strength, am I right?”

“Sorry, we’re not sure what you’re talking about.”

After a while, the voice in the transceiver spoke again.

“Is it because you don’t know or you don’t want to admit it?”

However, the “monster” seemed to be able to see through people’s minds. He continued to speak. “But I won’t bother with this. Now, I ask you to hand over the other Ark equipment in Europe. As long as we get the equipment, we’ll leave immediately.”

“And if... We don’t hand it over?”

The old voice in the transceiver asked suddenly.

“Just like the warning I gave you at the Ark Experimental Base, your human civilization will be hit by natural-disaster-level weapons.”

The “monster” responded.

“You mean, your Martian civilization will declare war on us humans?”

“No, it’s not ‘us’...”

Suddenly, the monster laughed softly again, his voice like steel slashing through glass, sharp and piercing. “You humans aren’t worth the effort. The only one who will attack you is ‘me’.”

“...”

Hearing these words from the monster, the other side of the transceiver fell silent again.

chapters.title: Chapter 512: Onslaught
chapters.body:
Chapter 512: Onslaught

Chapter 512: Onslaught

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Washington, White House.

Dozens of high-ranking federal officials were gathered around a conference table. All of them looked solemn and dignified. In front of their conference table, there was a huge screen. At this time, there was a wavy dotted line representing continuous syllables that flickered on the screen.

“We come for peace...

“You thought we were dead? But we didn’t die out but left the solar system and settled around Orion and the Pleiades...

“Although we’ve been away for a long, long time, we still know everything that your human civilization has done...

“C24 chromosome...”

...

After listening to these words, the gray-haired man sitting in the first seat said, “I think you all should understand by now that a group claiming to be Martians attacked our Ark Experimental Base in Papoose Lake, Nevada and occupied it.”

“Are they from Mars?”

A fat man on the side hesitated and said, “I have some doubts about how they came to Earth. If they came from outer space, our air defense system should be able to detect something.”

“Maybe their technology is beyond our systems, so it can’t be detected.”

Another middle-aged man in a military uniform replied, “After all, you should understand that as long as their technological system exceeds ours by a hundred years, it represents an entire new league. And if the other party is an ancient Martian civilization, then how much more advanced is their technology compared to ours?”

“No, you’ve all guessed wrong.”

However, the gray-haired man said immediately, “According to the final emergency request sent to us from the Ark Lab, the other party didn’t come from space, but came out of a crack in a space-time that suddenly appeared.”

“What?”

“Are you kidding me?”

“Impossible!”

In the meeting room, everyone exclaimed softly.

“Yes, it’s true.”

The gray-haired man continued to explain, “According to the message sent before the fall of the Ark Experimental Base, the other party rushed out of the Ark’s teleportation platform. However, unlike our regular usage of the Ark, they set up a pitch-black crack in time and space, like a black hole. All the invaders rushed out from there and as soon as they came out, they began to kill...”

As he said, he sighed, “At first I didn’t want to believe it, but after seeing their regiment destroy our RRTS Special Operations Squadron, I also have to believe that the opponent does have higher weapon technology than ours.”

The man in the first seat looked solemn and then he played a video from that time again. They saw a high-tech human form, wearing black armor, suspended in mid-air at a height of 100 meters. Rows of sights and shoulder cannons popped out behind him and the missiles that were fired were of no use at all.

When he counterattacked, within ten seconds, the entire Hellfighter helicopter formation fell...

In the end, the video ended with a helicopter crashing down extremely swiftly.

After watching this footage, the man in the first seat turned his head to look at the middle-aged man in military uniform. “Secretary Orison, as the highest officer in the Ministry of Defense, do you have any opinions on this video?”

“This video does illustrate a lot of things.”

At this time, the middle-aged man’s expression was already extremely serious. “First of all, the suit that the other party was wearing had a flying installation but I didn’t see any tail flames, which meant that it wasn’t in the form of a rocket boost that sent him up to the sky. It’s certainly not a propeller either but rather a method we don’t know of.

“Secondly, any missile will automatically detonate tens of meters in front of him. It’s very likely that it has a special jamming device that can affect the programming of the missile.

“Finally, the weapon system shown in this suit — if not mistaken, the wave that was used should be a high-power microwave weapon, but the energy is incredibly powerful. When the few helicopters were shot at in the end, a directional laser device was used...”

Speaking of this, the man in the uniform concluded. “The other party has hardly made any controlling movements from beginning to end. I have some suspicions that this set of equipment uses brain control technology... In short, this suit of armor’s technology really must’ve surpassed our human science and technology by more than 50 to 100 years.”

After listening to the analysis of the middle-aged man, everyone fell into silence for a while.

Only the man sitting in the first seat just nodded. He looked at the other man with some excessive anticipation. “Then, Secretary Orison, are we capable of targeting such individual combat weapons?”

“There are naturally many ways to target the opponent. The most primitive way is a sniper rifle.”

The middle-aged man replied, “Of course, it’s best to use an anti-material sniper rifle, but I don’t have much confidence in whether it can penetrate the opponent’s armor.”

“Why is that?”

“Didn’t a Stan missile explode more than ten meters away from the opponent?”

The middle-aged man immediately explained, “The Stan missile has an equivalent force of about 200 kilograms of TNT and a lethal radius of more than 22.5 meters. At his distance, he was even covered with smoke, which means that he has suffered at least an impact that was several times the power of an anti-material sniper rifle. The shockwave alone could smash people in a bunker to death, but he was unharmed, which means that the protection of the suit is also beyond our technological system.”

“So, isn’t it invulnerable?”

Someone blurted out involuntarily.

“At the moment, yes...”

The middle-aged man spread his hands. “But I think we can try electromagnetic bombs or bombardment with more powerful missiles, which may have a certain effect.”

“Very good.”

The man in the lead nodded and continued. “Secretary Orison, as far as I know, at least hundreds of researchers in the Ark Experimental Base have been captured by the other party and they also have breached the Ark Base’s cyber defense system. So, your Ministry of Defense must be sure to come up with a complete set of proposals to solve the problem. After all, we can’t give them the other Ark or at least we can’t give them now, otherwise, we might lose much more...”

“Understood, I’ll come up with a surefire plan.”

The man in uniform replied solemnly.

“Of course, it’s best if there’s a surefire plan.”

The man in the lead suddenly hinted. “If the cost is too great, we can also afford to lose something...”

The man in uniform was startled and he immediately understood what the other man meant.

“Of course, force is only the last strategy after all. Now we first need to figure out the origin, attitude, and other information on the other party.”

Suddenly, the man in lead changed his tone. “Minister Varo, the task of your Ministry of Foreign Affairs is equally momentous. If you can persuade the other party to submit to us, that would be ideal. If the other party is unwilling to submit, you have to appease them. We’d first have to rescue the hostages in the base.”

“Understood, I’ll send the best negotiator.”

In another seat, a pale, plump man replied.

“At the same time, we have to contact Europe to convince them that if things go out of control, they must hand over the other ‘Ark’.”

The man continued. “Got it, Minister Varo?”

However, before the man called Minister Varo could answer, suddenly there was a knock on the door of the conference room, then a security guard in a suit rushed in. He said in a panic, “Bad news, Mr. President. New York suddenly received an update that a man wearing black armor had breached the air defense network of the SFG military base at supersonic speed and arrived in the sky over New York!”

“What?”

Everyone’s expressions changed suddenly.

...

While an emergency meeting was being held in the East of Northern America to deal with this incident, Chen Chen had already arrived in the sky above New York City at this time.

As one of the most prosperous international cities in Northern America, New York was one of the symbols of Northern America. At the same time, this city was also the most important financial center on the east coast of the world.

At this time, in the PK Armor from the Predator dimension, Chen Chen’s headgear was displaying a radar image. In the image, there were three red dots in an array that were approaching ceaselessly and the PK Armor also automatically analyzed their speed. The speed of those red dots unexpectedly reached about twice the speed of sound.

“A new type of fighter jet in this world?”

Chen Chen suddenly became interested. In his original world, the fastest flying aircraft seemed to be called the MiG-25, but it was a reconnaissance type, and it had to be at high altitude.

Among the orthodox fighters, the fastest could reach about 2.5 times the speed of sound, which was Mach 2.5. If it were full of weapons, it would only reach Mach 1.5.

At this time, they were rushing toward him, so obviously they must be equipped. Nonetheless, their speed was still over Mach 2. This situation immediately aroused Chen Chen’s interest.

“Interesting.”

Chen Chen gave a low laugh. He dived and his Field suddenly made him swoop down quickly. In almost a few seconds, Chen Chen had landed on the most famous Brooklyn Bridge in New York!

“Boom!”

There was a violent vibration. Chen Chen’s landing directly created a huge deep hole on the bridge deck, exposing the steel bars as thick as a fist inside the bridge!

At the same time, three black dots quickly slashed across the sky, passing low above Chen Chen’s head as if this was a demonstration of force!

However, at the moment they passed over Chen Chen’s head, the three sights automatically popped out from Chen Chen’s back, locking onto the three fighters like a viper. In the next second, three azure blue lasers streaked through the sky and the three fighters practically exploded at the same moment!

“Boom!”

The flames blazed over the Brooklyn Bridge and all three fighters were wiped out!

“Oh my god!”

“Holy sh*t!”

Dozens of cars were blocked by Chen Chen’s figure and they had no choice but to stop. Several drivers got out of the car. Before they could say anything, they saw three fighter jets exploding above their heads. Suddenly, everyone could not help but exclaim from the heart.

“Oh, are there more?”

Three fighter jets had just exploded, but Chen Chen suddenly narrowed his eyes because more fighter jets were flying from afar. Not only that but behind the fighter jets, there were also rows of combat helicopters flying over. It was just that Chen Chen had landed on the Brooklyn Bridge, so they did not attack immediately.

However, when those fighters saw the fate of the first three planes, they immediately began to lift and passed over at a height of one thousand meters. As this distance was too far, they ultimately escaped Chen Chen’s laser strikes but the group of combat helicopters behind them suffered the subsequent catastrophe.

Chen Chen spread his hands and in the next second, he flew into the sky again, but this time more than a dozen cars took off with him. These cars seemed to have broken free of gravity and they rose to the sky simultaneously with Chen Chen. After that, they hurtled like cannonballs toward the helicopters hundreds of meters away!

“Boom!”

A few helicopters quickly dodged, but there were still a few helicopters that were hit by the high-speed cars and they erupted into a ball of fire on the spot!

It was not over yet. Everyone suddenly heard the vicious sound of tearing metal from the Brooklyn Bridge. Starting from where Chen Chen had flown, the bridge deck began to split apart bit by bit. At the same time, the suspension cables on both sides of the bridge also began to snap one by one at a visible speed!

These steel cables were like leather whips. As they lost their anchor, they popped out automatically, whipping past the bridge deck and the ocean. Dozens of cars were directly swept away on the spot!

Amid the cries and curses of countless people, the Brooklyn Bridge underwent an uncontrollable chain reaction and began to collapse!

“Oh my god, this simply can’t be real!”

The remaining combat helicopters could only stay far away. They hovered thousands of meters away from Chen Chen and watched the Brooklyn Bridge, one of the symbols of Northern America, collapse. Everyone looked terrified.

“Look, he’s flying away!”

A co-pilot said suddenly, “Where is he heading to?”

“That... Is the direction of downtown New York...”

...

“Boom!”

Chen Chen landed in the downtown area of ??New York. He looked around. This triangular street here was Times Square, known as the “crossroads of the world”.

chapters.title: Chapter 513: Admonishment
chapters.body:
Chapter 513: Admonishment

Chapter 513: Admonishment

A low vibration rumbled from the ground as if an ancient giant beast was slowly waking up. It bared its fangs and exposed its claws, trying to emerge from the ground...

The crossroads of the world and the financial center of civilization, Times Square, began to shudder violently at this moment. The screen of Nasdaq emitted a series of squeaks and cracks. This huge 36-meter-tall screen, which was made at a cost of more than 30 million dollars in 2002, burst out in a shower of sparks at this moment, like a rain of fire!

At the same time, the forty-meter-high Times Building gave out a thunderous roar and cracks emerged between the blocks. This building was uninhabited but was known as the Light of New York, and it also began to collapse!

The shattered screen, the splitting building, and countless pedestrians who screamed and scattered, together composed a magnificent symphony...

At the moment when this “symphony” reached its peak, suddenly, a whine of torn steel came from the top of the building. A crystal ball about two meters in diameter with the word “Hope for Peace” marked on it came crashing down from high above, shattering in Times Square with a “bang”!

However, this was just the beginning. In the next second, the Times Building collapsed in endless tremors like a fragile block of tofu. It was flattened where it stood, coughing out smoke and dust that blocked out the sky!

Next was the Nasdaq Stock Market building next to it. After the huge screen was shattered, the entire building could not hold on. Like soy pulp, the building also collapsed with a beastly wail while countless windows fragmented into countless shards!

Finally, there was the AT&T Building on the side. It crashed to the ground following the pace of the former buildings. At this moment, the entire Times Square was filled with endless smoke and dust. The dense clouds of debris swept the sky and were visible even dozens of kilometers away.

“My God, can this be done by one person?”

Not far away was the combat helicopter fleet, where everyone was exclaiming. They watched the world’s most prosperous intersection crash and disappeared, and everyone felt a trace of irrepressible dismay...

That was their mourning for the fragility of civilization, for the fate of humankind.

Nonetheless, in the next moment, they could not continue to be sorrowful because the demonic figure did not stop at destroying Times Square. He flew up again, eliciting a sonic boom of water vapor in the air, moving to the next target...

That direction was...

Everyone could not help widening their eyes while gasping sharply. They all had a faint idea.

“D*mn it, who will stop that monster, he’s going to the Empire State Building!”

On the channel, the commander-in-chief of this operation yelled in fright, “Quick, stop him at all costs!”

This group of combat helicopters then reacted. They quickly turned and flew toward the Empire State Building, but in the face of an enemy who easily broke through the sound barrier, how could a clumsy helicopter catch up?

“Boom!”

In the next second, everyone watched as the 400-meter-tall skyscraper not far away suffered an explosion in its middle. A huge hole with a diameter of more than 30 meters penetrated the bulk of the building, ripping a big hole in the center of the building!

In an instant, plumes of thick smoke rose, and the entire city was filled with screams and prayers...

Still, after all, it was a landmark building that had been certified by the world. Even if a big hole was pierced through the middle, this building still showed no tendency to collapse.

Seeing this scene, many people secretly breathed a sigh of relief.

However, as the initial culprit of this incident, Chen Chen did not even look at it. He continued to fly south in this direction, but after ten seconds, he once again came to a more familiar place.

There were innumerable tall buildings here and the road in the center was like a gap in a canyon. These skyscrapers all had names that were familiar to the world —

Citibank Headquarters, JPMorgan Chase Bank Headquarters, New York Stock Exchange, New York Futures Exchange, and so on...

If Times Square was the commercial center of human civilization, then Wall Street was the financial center of human civilization.

This was the famous Wall Street.

At this time, most of the businessmen on Wall Street had evacuated but Chen Chen’s purpose was not to kill people. He had waited for most of the people in Times Square to disperse before destroying the square. All this looked terrifying but in reality, there were not many casualties.

In other words, Chen Chen was just here to show off his strength.

As Chen Chen descended on Wall Street, he stood firm on the narrow and cramped street. In the next second, a few finger-thick warheads were halted right in front of Chen Chen. These warheads had hit the invisible barrier that was formed by Field, but were only intercepted and stopped after a few centimeters!

However, this was just the beginning. In the next second, several grenades with long tails of flames sprang from the buildings and exploded quickly when they hit Chen Chen’s body. In the next second, inexhaustible flames and smoke rose and blanketed everything on the street!

“Don’t stop, the opponent has a defensive field outside his body. Keep shooting, don’t stop!”

Various weapons and special forces soldiers hidden between the floors kept attacking. The commander’s roar reverberated through their headsets, so they poured their ammunition into the dense smoke without hesitation as if they had gone mad.

“Boom, boom, boom, boom, boom...”

It was not until almost half of Wall Street had begun to smoke that everyone’s firepower stopped. It was not that they did not want to continue shooting, but that they could only bring over this much ammunition in a hurry. Even so, with Chen Chen’s location as the center of the circle, within a radius of several thousand square meters, the area seemed to have been plowed by a cannonball.

The headquarters building of JPMorgan Chase Bank was also severely affected and it was rather wobbly...

All of this was also broadcasted live by surveillance satellites and the footage was projected directly in the conference room of the White House. All the high-ranking officials in Northern America were gathered here, silently watching everything on the screen.

“Is he killed?”

Everyone’s eyes widened, staring at the thick fog of smoke on the screen. The firepower in the past few minutes was considered their limit. If they still could not kill the other party, then they had no other way except for nuclear weapons.

However, using nuclear weapons in New York City? No one dared to give this order.

Just as everyone was looking in anticipation at the billowing smoke, suddenly, a dark figure slowly walked out of the smoke. He tilted his head and looked above him at the same time, then spread his hands again...

“No —!”

At this moment, the entire conference room was full of emotions such as anger, unwillingness, fear, and so on. These emotions were mixed to form a deep snarling roar.

In the next second, before their eyes, a series of skyscrapers on Wall Street collapsed. Whether it was the headquarters of Citibank, the headquarters of JPMorgan Chase Bank or the New York Stock Exchange, these skyscrapers that would be landmark buildings in any city, all collapsed at this moment!

After razing the entire Wall Street to the ground, the monster finally took off again and continued to fly south.

“D*mn, what else is there in the south?”

In the conference room, the man at their head finally could not help it. He bellowed loudly, “Who can tell me, what else is there south of Wall Street?”

“It’s the Statue of Liberty...”

The middle-aged man in military uniform involuntarily closed his eyes. He whispered, “Southwest of Wall Street is our Statue of Liberty...”

In an instant, the entire room was so quiet one could hear a pin drop. It was a silence filled with unspeakable despair...

However, Chen Chen did not stop because of the will of this group of people. He moved forward at the speed of sound and in less than ten seconds, he had reached the sky above Liberty Island.

On this small island in the southwest corner of Manhattan, New York, the statue of the goddess that symbolized freedom and democracy stood tall.

Chen Chen landed directly on the head of the Statue of Liberty, looking at the entire New York City. At this time, the sky was gradually darkening. He knew that countless people were watching him silently at this moment, so he tapped his helmet lightly.

The next moment, flickers of blue light flashed and withdrew over his body. In just a few seconds, the entire PK Armor had shrunk back to the form of an armguard. At this moment, Chen Chen’s face was exposed to innumerable people.

“Humans, as your ancestor, I’m very disappointed...”

Chen Chen spoke suddenly and his voice was amplified thousands of times like thunder through the enhancement of Field energy, echoing over the entire New York City.

Chen Chen put on a look of compassion. He looked around the entire city like a god in the sky. “Millions of years ago, we brought our DNA to the earth, carried our hopes and long-cherished wishes, and created a group of ancient humans... ...

“In your body, our blood is flowing;

“In your souls, our tears are stored.”

As this passage echoed throughout New York, the city that was already in turmoil suddenly fell silent. Everyone stopped fleeing, looked over in surprise, and could not help but stare at the standing figure in the distance.

“After that, we had no choice but to leave and gave this beautiful planet to you. We had hoped that you could transform this planet into a more prosperous planet, but it’s a pity...”

When talking about this, Chen Chen paused slightly. At the same time, the memories of everyone in New York City were also evoked. They could not help but recall the incomparable nuclear war of World War III.

“Your power was bestowed by us. We were far away in the Pleiades star cluster. We once looked at you proudly and watched you grow day by day and gradually become the masters of this planet.”

Chen Chen’s voice was solemn. “You must remember that we’ve always used wisdom and power to conquer and transform nature, and we also believed that you’d use your power carefully.

“However, those of you who are too powerful have lost your glory and your reverence for nature.”

When Chen Chen mentioned this, everyone was completely silent. The expressions on the faces of everyone in New York City gradually calmed down. They looked sadly at all this and as the city caught in a sea of flames, many people began to reflect.

“Today, I taught you a lesson. I could’ve destroyed your civilization, but glory and blood are thicker than water, which prevents me from doing that.”

Chen Chen suddenly raised his hand and pointed to his chest. “What I want to tell you is that the power you’re so proud of isn’t powerful. For us, real power isn’t the power of force, but the strength of the soul.

“However, your hearts have long become deserts...”

All of this was also transmitted to the White House at the same time. At this moment, listening to Chen Chen’s narration, everyone wore an unbelieving look.

“This guy... Is this guy a human being?”

A senior official shouted, “Look, he has the same appearance and body shape as ours. D*mn, he’s totally a human!”

“No, he’s not a human, he’s a Martian!”

“Is the origin of humankind Mars? No wonder the C24 chromosome technology can be used on humans...”

In an instant, the entire meeting room was in disorder.

“Everyone be quiet!”

The Secretary of Defense hurriedly stopped everyone. “Don’t be affected by his words. Regardless of whether he’s the ancestor of humankind or not, we just need to know that now he’s the enemy of humankind!”

“No, listen to him...”

However, the man in the lead was shaken and he whispered, “Didn’t you notice that he has even removed the armor, but still can transmit his voice across the city. What does this mean?

“It means that he’s a superhuman. Not only did he possess weapon technology far surpassing human beings but also possess superhuman abilities?”

Someone asked immediately.

At this moment, the entire conference room fell silent again and everyone felt a chill...

At this time, Chen Chen still loudly spouted his Chicken-Soup-for-the-Soul-schmaltz. “Love your environment, protect your Earth, and don’t let the nightmare of that year repeat itself. We... Will wait for you in the Pleiades star cluster!”

As the theme was presented, the speech came to an end, and another helicopter flew over in the direction of Manhattan.

Still, unlike the previous helicopters, this helicopter was not an armed helicopter, but an ordinary commercial helicopter. Not only that, but it also was sprayed with conspicuous words such as “peace” and “negotiation” in spray paint.

Chen Chen did not attack the helicopter. He just stood quietly, watching the helicopter gradually approach, and finally hovered more than ten meters in front of him.

On the helicopter, a man in a suit held up a loudspeaker and shouted from the cabin, “Honorable Martian, I’m here to inquire on behalf of our government. What do you mean by everything you’ve said, is it to warn us of something?”

“I only said it because I felt like it.”

Chen Chen answered indifferently, but what was strange was that the gust of wind created by the helicopter propellers could not shift him at all. The barrier that could block all attacks was still there. “I just showed you the power that advanced civilizations should have, to make you understand that the power of human beings is nothing to speak of.”

“I believe your words...”

The man in the suit continued to shout, “Then you can stop the uh... Attack on New York City? Maybe we can sit down and talk peacefully between our two civilizations and at the same time, we can talk about the other Ark.”

“Of course.”

Chen Chen nodded. “The reason I attacked New York is to demonstrate my strength to warn you. Now that the goal has been achieved, I can certainly stop.”

While speaking, Chen Chen turned around and walked directly into the crown of the Statue of Liberty. “Send your representative and let them speak to me. As long as you hand over the Ark, we can leave immediately...”

chapters.title: Chapter 514: Another Negotiation
chapters.body:
Chapter 514: Another Negotiation

Chapter 514: Another Negotiation

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

A few hours later, when the sun went down completely and the entire New York City began to clean up the tragic battlefield, Chen Chen was standing high above the New York City Hall at this time.

Below him, thousands of soldiers stood guard in front of the city hall, with tanks lined up and guns poking out like a hedgehog’s quills.

However, to tell the truth, those people in the city hall would not believe that these soldiers could deter Chen Chen at all. They were more like self-deceiving ostriches, used to give them a bit of courage.

“Boom!”

With a dull landing “thud”, Chen Chen jumped from a high altitude and stood in front of the gate of the city hall guarded by countless soldiers. These soldiers seemed to be taken aback in fright. They raised their guns and aimed at Chen Chen.

“Lower your weapons, all of you, lower them now!”

The commander in charge only felt his scalp turn numb. He quickly called on his subordinates to put down their guns and steeled his nerves before walking toward Chen Chen.

When he was four or five meters away from Chen Chen, he stopped, and at the same time, raised his right hand to make a military salute, shouting, “Northern American Independent Division Commander, Colonel Gibbon Claire reporting to you. Please wait a moment. Our Mr. Mayor will come right away.”

As he was speaking, a white-haired man showed up at the gate with a group of city hall officials. Although they tried their best to keep calm, if one looked closely, one could still see the panic in their eyes.

This group of people walked in slowly, but when they walked to Claire, they would not go any further. Only the white-haired man heading them bit the bullet and walked in front of Chen Chen. He stretched out his hand stiffly. “I’m the Mayor of New York City, Sapir Ashburn, who welcomes you on behalf of Northern America...”

Seeing this, Chen Chen stretched out his hand and shook the other man’s hand lightly. When he did so, he could feel the man in front of him trembling.

“Ashburn, you may call me ‘the Watchman’.”

“So, so you’re Sir Watchman...”

Upon hearing this, Mayor Ashburn hurriedly said with a forced smile, “Now please come in with us. I’m in charge of the friendly negotiation between the two sides on behalf of Northern America.”

Chen Chen nodded and allowed the other man to withdraw his palm and then he walked towards the city hall at the servile invitation from Mayor Ashburn.

Although Chen Chen was now practically a humanoid nuclear bomb, he still needed to be cautious. Before entering the city hall, he used the Field to go deep into the city hall and only walked in after first making sure that there were no killer maneuvers in the city hall.

Under the mayor’s personal guidance, Chen Chen and a group of officials were taken to a conference room. Chen Chen took a seat on one side of the conference table and the rest of the people sat on the opposite side reluctantly.

“I wonder if you want coffee or some other beverage?”

Mayor Ashburn asked again.

“There’s no need for that.”

Chen Chen casually waved one hand. “I’ve shown you my sincerity to talk to you. Now, it’s enough that you tell me when I can get the other Ark.”

“This...”

Hearing that, everyone’s expression changed and Mayor Ashburn smiled bitterly. “If you understand our human civilization, then you should understand that the other Ark in the world is not in Northern America. Rather, it’s in Europe, which doesn’t belong to the same polity as us.”

“Of course, I know this.”

Chen Chen nodded. “But I also know that the European region has always followed Northern America blindly. If you ask them to hand over the Ark, they have no reason to refuse. Am I right?”

“This...”

Everyone hesitated.

Hearing this, Mayor Ashburn looked even more agonized. He was about to argue that this was not the case, but Chen Chen suddenly narrowed his eyes, and a cold glint shone in his gaze.

As if understanding that Chen Chen was not a gullible person, Mayor Ashburn shuddered all over. He nodded painfully. “I understand, I’ll report this condition to my superiors...”

“You’re wasting my time, Mayor Ashburn!”

However, as Mayor Ashburn said these words, Chen Chen’s expression turned to ice. He slowly stood up and an invisible force restrained the entire conference room.

In an instant, everyone’s throats were strangled. They kept touching their necks, but found that there was nothing there!

“If you can’t represent the Northern American government, then let someone else at a higher level, who can make decisions, do it.”

Chen Chen said in a deep voice as he walked step by step to Ashburn, “I’ve shown enough sincerity and even condescended to come to meet you, but you said, ‘report to my superiors’...

“Are you kidding around with me?”

As Chen Chen spoke, Ashburn only felt his throat tighten. He could not help but gasp, but no matter how he gasped, the air seemed to be solidified and he could not draw any air into his lungs at all!

“Uhh... Ughh...”

Ashburn kept scrabbling at his throat with both hands. He wanted to explain, but there was no sound in the depths of his throat. He could only show a pleading expression and stare at Chen Chen’s eyes.

When Ashburn felt that he was about to die from suffocation, finally, his throat suddenly loosened, and then he collapsed to the ground as his body turned limp, gasping for breath!

“Huff, Sir Watchman... Huff, I’m really sorry...”

Ashburn quickly justified, “I assure you that you’ll get that European Ark in 30 days. 30 days and I will do as I say!”

“No, not just one.”

Chen Chen continued to speak and he stared at the other man condescendingly from above. “There are two. You must also dismantle the one on Mars, transport it back, and hand it over to me.”

“... Yes!”

Seeing this, Ashburn had no choice but to nod.

“Very good, so the deal is concluded.”

Seeing this, Chen Chen smiled again. He pulled the other man up from the ground and looked around at the horrified group. “If 30 days later, I still don’t get what I want, then I promise that the entire human civilization will suffer from an unprecedented attack...

“And this time, it won’t be as easily resolved as today...”

With that, Chen Chen cracked an icy smile at all of them, then turned around. The window behind him suddenly shattered.

Then, Chen Chen stepped forward. His figure took off directly and flew out of the window.

“Boom!”

As a deafening wave of air came from outside the window, Chen Chen went directly into a supersonic state and disappeared into the night sky.

It was not until Chen Chen left that everyone crawled out from under the table in pathetic embarrassment. At the same time, there was a commotion of running outside the door. The next second, a crowd of soldiers with live ammunition rushed in.

“You can stop being on guard. He’s already left.”

Ashburn’s face looked stormy. He waved his hands at the many soldiers and asked them to withdraw. Then, he sat down on the chair in front of him in dazed shock.

In the next second, the screen in front of the conference room automatically turned on, revealing the scene in another conference room.

“It looks like you failed.”

In the video, it was the figures of the previous group of high-ranking officials in the White House. Obviously, the previous negotiation had been under observation.

“It’s terrible, Mr. President.”

Ashburn shook his head with a dejected expression. “The countermeasures we prepared for various situations didn’t come into play at all. Even the best negotiators, psychologists, and behavior analysts didn’t come in handy because he didn’t have any intention of negotiating with us at all. He was only here to state his request.”

“We understand that he does have such a right when there’s a huge gap in our power.”

In the video, the middle-aged man sitting in the first seat nodded and then he looked at everyone again. “His previous words pointed out that the attack before this was just a show of strength. If we can’t hand over the Arks within 30 days, he’ll take more drastic measures...”

“All this is secondary. I’ve noticed something even scarier.”

Suddenly, the Secretary of Defense, who had been silent, said in a low voice, “You should’ve also seen that the strange armor that he had on before was not worn during the negotiation, but he can still fly around to such an extent. Doesn’t that mean...”

The Secretary of Defense was silent for a while before continuing to say with some difficulty, “Doesn’t that mean that he didn’t rely on science and technology to fly? Could it be that the previous destructive power that readily demolished tall buildings was all his own?

“If this is the case, it’d be too frightening...”

The president of Northern America wore a more solemn expression. “Superpowers? Or is it the ‘spiritual powers’ he mentioned before? Can the Department of Defense analyze this?”

“I’m afraid that we’ll have to wait for experts to arrive on Wall Street and Times Square before we can judge.”

The Secretary of Defense replied, “Now the only shame is that he didn’t drink water, let alone contaminate any objects on the negotiating table, otherwise, we can extract his DNA for analysis to find out the secrets of this ‘Watchman’...”

“He was also guarding against all that. It seems that we can only contact the European authorities.”

Seeing this, the middle-aged man in charge, as the president of Northern America, finally made up his mind. He looked at the Minister of Foreign Affairs and said, “Contact Europe as soon as possible and convince them to give up the ‘Ark’. And here in New York City, you can continue to think about how to contact the other party and see if you can find any new opportunities...”

“Yes...”

Ashburn nodded.

Immediately, the screen in the conference room flashed again and completely shut down.

...

At this time, after a period of flying, Chen Chen crossed a distance of several thousand kilometers and returned to the sky above Papoose Lake in Nevada.

The reason he had to use a roundabout way to attack the Doom dimension and capture the “Ark” instead of taking the most usual way of directly extracting the “Ark” from the USB flash drive was that there was no specific equipment for the “Ark” in the movie.

At most, there was the “water ball” that appeared in the movie. As the “Ark” activated, the water ball would wrap around the passenger in front of it and then vanish directly with a “whoosh”.

When the passenger came back to their senses, they had already arrived at the other Ark on Mars.

As the Ark was not shown from beginning to end, Chen Chen could not use the first method of direct extraction, so he opened the portal and used the second form of the USB drive to enter the world of Doom and seize it himself.

Now it seemed that all this was going well. He also discovered a shocking secret. It turned out that not every world opened by the USB flash drive was post-apocalyptic. This could be said to be Chen Chen’s biggest discovery after obtaining the USB flash drive.

At this time, Chen Chen came back to the sky above the Ark Experimental Base. As the underground passage opened again, Chen Chen took the elevator back to the interior of the base.

“Sir Commander, I know everything you’ve done through the Internet.”

As soon as he returned to the Ark Experimental Base, the voice of X-112 came again. “At the same time, Northern America is constantly trying to wrest back control of the Ark Base and also wants to establish contact with us to test things out.”

“Don’t pay attention to them.”

Chen Chen said nonchalantly, “Let’s wait for 30 days. If they haven’t gotten the Arks by that time, I need to use memetic weapons to teach them a lesson.”

“Got it.”

X-112 responded, “In addition, I also found the so-called C24 chromosome technology from the laboratory database and discovered that although this technology may not be usable on a large scale, it can be used on the Black Knights. This will further strengthen their ability to continue combat and recover.”

“It’s true, the Black Knights won’t turn good or evil because they don’t even have brains.”

Chen Chen suddenly remembered. “The Black Knights are completely immune to the side effects of the C24 chromosome. In that case, let’s take it away with us.”

Judging from the movie, this C24 chromosome effect could only be said to be rather conventional. Even the protagonist of the movie only had three aspects that were enhanced, namely strength, responsiveness, and resilience. The enhancement was roughly equivalent to that of Alice infected by the T-virus and even slightly inferior.

In the past, Chen Chen would have done anything to obtain this sort of enhancement, but to the current him, it was only icing on the cake, because this C24 chromosome technology could not be used on Chen Chen himself.

Now Chen Chen had asked to pack it up and take it away, only to study it further. Maybe if he was lucky enough, he could develop something more valuable.

In addition, X-112 had also invaded the national defense network systems of various countries in the world and picked out some useful technologies from them such as the “BFG Bio Force Gun”, which was a kind of weapon in the movie that could punch a two-meter-diameter hole in the half-meter-thick steel wall. There was also the “nanowall” technology mentioned before.

The nanowall, as the name implied, was a wall made of nano-materials. It usually existed as a door. In this state, any object could pass through the nanowall.

However, once a certain switch was triggered, the nanowall would suddenly change from its fluid state to become a solid wall. The nanowall in this state was indestructible and even bullets would bounce back while the wall remained undamaged.

In addition, there were many modern technology applications unique to this world. These technologies could be adapted to reality and make Chen Chen’s scientific research projects even more comprehensive and efficient.

Finally, Chen Chen directly issued an order for the group of researchers held hostage to start dismantling the “Ark” in the experimental base. He wanted to first transport this Ark back to reality. When the other two Arks were also paid up, he was going to put one in the Spire Experimental Base and one on Mars.

As for the last one, Chen Chen intended to secretly place it on the back of the moon and build a helium-3 mining field there.

chapters.title: Chapter 515: Doorway
chapters.body:
Chapter 515: Doorway

Chapter 515: Doorway

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

The other side of the USB drive’s portal was left to X-112, who was asked to report back if there were any problems at any time. Then, Chen Chen returned to the real world.

Only a day later, the first Ark was transported to reality.

When Chen Chen received the news and rushed over, he saw this piece of equipment in the vast and enclosed teleportation hall.

“Is this it?”

Seeing the product in front of him, Chen Chen could not help frowning, feeling a little taken aback.

What he was met with was a spherical device with a diameter of five meters. Its body was white and had a weathered, ancient appearance.

Just like aged white plastic, which would have the dullness of age. The same went for the huge sphere in front of him.

True, the Ark was spherical, but it was not a total spherical shape. It seemed to be two hemispheres placed together. The gap in the middle was half a meter wide. Through the gap, one could see the darkness inside.

On the surface of the ball, there were more than a dozen grooves of unknown function. Each groove was only the thickness of a finger and unlike the whiteness of the spherical surface, the grooves were black.

These surface grooves surrounded the face of the sphere. They were long and short, without any regularity between them or with a regularity that no one except the designer could point out.

At this time, what Chen Chen saw was such a huge sphere.

“This is the Ark that was dismantled from the dimension of Doom.”

Little X followed beside Chen Chen. She had grown into a slim girl. At this time, she explained to Chen Chen, “When we were in the Ark Experimental Base, the entire sphere was buried under the steel floor, with only one port on top of the sphere. The ‘water ball’ shown in the movie that can envelop human beings also emerges from that port on the sphere.”

“Oh?”

Chen Chen flew up rapidly when he heard these words and he saw a small, jagged hole above the sphere. The hole was a dark blue color.

“Then how do you activate it and what is the principle of the ‘Ark’?”

“I’m afraid you’ll be disappointed.”

Little X immediately explained, “Even those in that dimension haven’t figured it out. When they found the Ark, it already looked like a teleportation platform. At most, they refurbished the teleportation platform such as replacing some old machinery and any equipment that can be understood, but they have never been able to study and understand the core of the Ark. This is beyond the scope of modern science.”

“I see...”

Chen Chen at once gave up on that hope because if even they could not understand it, then it was like showing the six-cylinder engine of a modern car to a group of primitive people. This group of primitive people would enjoy watching it at best. Besides that, they could forget about understanding anything.

As the Ark contained a set of unknown scientific theories as well as matching industrial technology, if one had not reached this level, the Ark could only be observed but not understood even if it were broken down into the most basic components.

Thinking of this, Chen Chen reached out and took the “Ark” blueprint from a Black Knight. In addition to this core, it still needed a platform that could house the core and a high-power photon signal transmitter. When these things were combined into one, it became a complete set of an Ark transmission device.

“According to the requirements on the design drawings, customize this equipment.”

Seeing this, Chen Chen said immediately, “When the second Ark is also transported back to reality, we can start experimenting. As long as it works, we can transport supplies to Mars at will instead of using spacecraft to go back and forth.”

“If this is the case, we have to consider how to avoid the observation of the other four continents.”

Little X said immediately, “In addition, we have to consider building a secret base on Mars, otherwise, it’ll still be discovered by those from the four continents.”

“This does need to be considered, so let’s plan for the long-term.”

Chen Chen nodded, then turned and left.

Soon, more than ten days passed by quickly.

...

More than ten days later, in the dimension of Doom, in the Mars Olduvai Research Facility.

“Hup!”

Four or five workers in orange work clothes were manipulating the crane-like device in front of them, lifting an old spherical device from the metal floor that was split open.

There was a special logo on the clothing of this group of workers. At the same time, there was a line written in English on the logo: United Aerospace Corporation or UAC for short.

If Chen Chen saw this at this time, he would immediately recognize it. This logo was from a gargantuan local company in the world of Doom. Its business even permeated the Northern American Congress and had expanded to every corner of the world.

Even the Mars Olduvai Research Facility was opened by this company.

In the story of the movie Doom, it was also the company responsible for researching the C24 chromosome technology on Mars. After the inciting incident, the Northern American Congress swiftly dispatched the RRTS Special Operations Squadron which the protagonist was a part of.

When the team was dispatched, the only command issued by the upper level to the captain played by Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson was:

“Protect and retrieve all property of the UAC!”

From this detail, it was enough to show how huge the influence of this company in Northern America was...

“Ah, it’s coming out, hurry and prepare the protection. Don’t let it be dented!”

At this time, one of the foremen suddenly shouted. He was manipulating a crane. At this time, under the crane, there was the core of the Ark, worn and weathered.

Following his order, the group of workers immediately stepped forward to prevent the huge ball from bumping into anything.

“Hey, Scott...”

When everyone was busy with work, one of the slovenly middle-aged workers whispered to a companion beside him, “I’ve been thinking of this question a long time. If we dig out this thing, then how do we return to Earth in the future?”

“Naturally, we’ll take a spaceship.”

The worker called Scott shrugged. “I prefer to take a spaceship. Although it’s a bit slower, at least I won’t get motion sickness...”

“Oh, you’re right.”

The unkempt worker nodded and he was immediately convinced.

After all, every time the Ark teleported someone, the dizziness generated was enough to make the passenger throw up their last night’s dinner.

“What are you two talking about? Better hurry up and concentrate on work!”

Seeing the two whispering to each other, the foreman suddenly yelled.

It was not until the core of the Ark was completely removed from the bottom of the pit that everyone sighed in relief. The sloppy worker glanced at the bottom of the pit casually, but he was stunned at that moment.

“What’s wrong, Sam?”

Scott asked offhandedly, only to find that his best friend did not respond for the first time, so he followed the other’s gaze and looked down.

However, he only saw a metal door that was flat on the ground, covered with unknown patterns, like the entrance to a cellar...

...

Thirty days passed quickly. On the last day of the 30-day-period, a spacecraft flew in from outside and stopped near Papoose Lake in North America.

A dozen soldiers got off the spaceship a little nervously and behind them was a strangely shaped transport truck. Within the carriage of the transport truck was the core of the Ark.

As the spacecraft arrived, the ground in front of everyone was slowly elevated and then an old concrete elevator entrance rose from the ground. After that, a pair of heavily armed Black Knights wearing PK Armor came out of the elevator.

“We’ve brought it.”

An officer walked out from the group of soldiers. He waved his hand for the transport truck to come forward. “This is the core of the Ark that you want.”

One of the Black Knights nodded immediately. He stepped forward, vaulted himself onto the truck, and then glanced at the core of the Ark in the carriage. He waved his hand after confirming the authenticity. Suddenly, there was another Black Knight who stepped out and replaced the previous driver to drive the transport truck into the elevator.

The core of the last Ark was finally in hand.

After seeing that they had confirmed the authenticity, the officer said a little timidly, “Since you have got what you wanted, can the researchers in the base be released now?”

However, his words received no response.

The other party seemed to be a group of soulless beings, returning one by one to the elevator, without any reaction to the officer’s words.

“Uh...”

The officer could only watch the elevator door close again. After the elevator descended downward, the originally elevated platform was retracted underground as if this place had always been an incomparably ordinary wasteland.

Seeing this, the officer had no choice but to turn on the communicator. He said softly, “Mr. Commander, we’ve delivered the last core of the Ark, but the other party didn’t respond to our proposal for the release of the prisoners.”

“If that’s the case, forget it. You should head back for the time being. Don’t stay there anymore, so as not to be misunderstood by the other party.”

A low voice came from the communicator.

“Yes...”

At the same time, far away in the White House in Washington, all the top leaders in Northern America also received this news.

“It looks like the transaction is over.”

In the meeting room, everyone secretly breathed a sigh of relief.

“Although the other party didn’t directly release the hostages, this is a good start.”

The president leading them stated, “What we have to do now is to monitor their every move to prevent any new incidents from happening again.”

“I hope that they’ll comply with the requirements and can leave after getting the three Arks.”

The Minister of Foreign Affairs on the side also spoke because everyone understood that their so-called surveillance was just self-comforting empty talk. As long as the other party stayed on for another day, everyone could not even sleep well. Many officials here had lost a lot of weight in the thirty days.

“Okay, now we can talk about the next topic.”

Without continuing with the previous subject, the president suddenly changed his tone. “I think you have all received the secret notice. After the core of the Ark on Mars was moved away, a large sturdy door was found below. No matter what method was used, we couldn’t open it.”

Everyone looked at each other wordlessly, then nodded together.

“But now I want to give you the latest update.”

Suddenly, the president cracked a smile of gratification. “Just yesterday, the Olduvai Research Facility sent news that, after they used a million-degree ultra-high field laser for cutting, the door finally showed signs of being cut open.”

“How many people know about this news?”

Another senior official asked aloud.

“Very few, except for the Olduvai Research Facility on Mars, only a few people from the United Aerospace Corporation and a few of us on Earth have received this news for the time being. The total number of these people in the world doesn’t exceed 30.”

The president was full of confidence. “And I think it’s best not to let these outsiders who call themselves Martians know of this. After all, no one knows what’s under the door.”

“Might be the technology left over from the Martian civilization.”

The Minister of Foreign Affairs was yearning. “If we can get the strange exoskeleton armor technology that the man wore before, it would be great...”

“That exoskeleton armor is nothing.”

However, the Minister of Commerce next to him immediately curled his lips and said, “I’d rather have his supernatural power that allows flight through the sky, it’s almost a miracle!”

“Maybe it’s a technology for immortality, who knows.”

Someone continued to add.

Once they talked about this, everyone became excited as if the alien legacy far away behind the door of Mars was already in their pockets.

“Alright, everyone, be quiet!”

The President of Northern America raised his hands and suppressed the noise of the crowd. “We don’t know what it is, but there must be something very precious in it because when we discovered the Ark’s teleportation platform on Mars, we conducted various tests on the ground beneath but nothing besides the core of the Ark has been found at all.

“That is to say, this kind of thing had been intentionally hidden to the point where our technology can’t detect it in the slightest. Only now, after taking out the core of the Ark, we discovered its existence...”

“Yes, this thing must never be revealed to those bandits!”

Everyone nodded.

“Maybe they know about it...”

Suddenly, the Secretary of Defense who had been silent said, “If the other party is a prehistoric Martian civilization, then it’s very likely that they know the door exists.”

Everyone was silent when they heard these words.

“What you said is also possible.”

The president nodded in agreement. “So, I’m thinking that we just need to pretend to be ignorant for a while. If he doesn’t mention the door, it means that he doesn’t know about the existence of the door, right?

“Thus, in any case, the confidentiality of this door must be well kept. This is what I ask of you.”

Everyone naturally guaranteed this again and again.

Only the Secretary of Defense was still a little gloomy. He stared blankly at the report in his hand. It was the description of the door that was found this time, ranging from its size, pattern, material, to all kinds of guesses from the Olduvai Research Facility. There was no end to the data.

What was even more unbelievable was that they did not know what material the door was made of. The entire door was so strong and solid that even the hardest drill bit was used to no avail. There was no way to open it so far.

However, it was precisely this difficulty of opening the door that made everyone in the White House look forward to what was inside.

chapters.title: Chapter 516: Developments In The Resident Evil Dimension
chapters.body:
Chapter 516: Developments In The Resident Evil Dimension

Chapter 516: Developments in the Resident Evil Dimension

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Chen Chen did not know about the door that was found on Mars in the dimension of Doom.

After getting everything he wanted, he thought of leaving.

After all, every time something entered or exited the portal opened by the USB drive, it consumed energy. After a month of going in and out, the energy in the USB drive was also nearly exhausted.

Thus, after withdrawing all the Black Knights, he decisively closed the USB drive.

He originally had another idea and that was to bring researchers from the other world over to work for himself.

Still, after thinking about it, he finally dispelled the unreliable idea.

After all, after bringing them over, the secret of the USB flash drive would be revealed. Unless this group of researchers stayed out of contact with the outside world for the rest of their lives, sooner or later they would know the truth — that they were not in an alien world, but another human civilization.

Moreover, if they were not allowed to contact the outside world and were just imprisoned in the Spire like prisoners, then that was also a problem. After all, humans were social animals and long-term depression would inevitably lead to a mental breakdown. At that time, these researchers would not only be unable to bring any benefits to Chen Chen but on the contrary, became a cumbersome burden.

Therefore, Chen Chen discarded that thought.

However, Chen Chen did not mean to give up on this dimension directly but instead planned to open this portal again if possible. As early as when he entered Elysium’s dimension, Chen Chen had figured out most of the rules of the second form of the U disk. One of them was —

The opening of the portal could be repeated to an extent, allowing temporary closure. As long as another channel was not opened, the previous channel could be retained.

Unless necessary, Chen Chen would not open a channel to another dimension. Then, the next time he opened Doom, the USB drive’s channel would still be connected to this world and the time flow of that world would be equal to reality’s.

Chen Chen believed that there was room for further cooperation between him and Doom’s dimension.

After returning to reality, they worked as quickly as possible in the Spire Experimental Base. Within half a month, the three Ark teleportation equipment were completed, to the point where experiments could be carried out. The test subjects were naturally Delta-level personnel detained inside the Spire.

To perform the tests, Little X first used the Gantz sphere to teleport these Ark materials to the ground, then set up the three Arks in three hidden places, and renamed the three Arks as: teleporter Watchman 1, Watchman 2, and Watchman 3.

In this way, even if their appearance was changed and they were revealed to outsiders, at most those people would only be surprised that this kind of teleportation was a bit similar to the one in the story of the movie Doom, but they would not think there was any connection between the two.

Moreover, to test the factors of distance and speed, of the three teleporters, one was erected in the Spire Experimental Base and the remaining two were temporarily erected in the Congo tropical rain forest a thousand kilometers away and in the Pacific Ocean 10,000 kilometers away.

A total of 100 Delta-level personnel were used in this experiment. The final teleportation success rate was stable at 100% and the teleportation time had been maintained at about 0.01 seconds.

This was the smallest unit of time that the instrument could detect.

In other words, the teleportation speed of these three Arks was the same as that shown in the data, which was 99.9999% the speed of light.

In that case, it would take only about 20 minutes to teleport from Earth to Mars.

Nonetheless, X-112 had obtained the data from the Ark Experimental Base in the world of Doom earlier on. From this data, it could be seen that if it was interplanetary teleportation, a focus coordinate system was required every time. After all, the space between the planets was in constant motion.

If the focus was misaligned, it was very likely that the situation in the movie would occur — a man’s upper body reached the destination, but his lower body flew toward the vast unending universe.

In addition, the teleporter also relied on electricity for teleportation. Each teleportation also consumed a huge amount of electricity. Fortunately, Chen Chen did not possess much else but had plenty of electricity and it was supported by a nuclear fusion reactor. Chen Chen did not need to be concerned about energy.

After finishing the experiment, the next thing Chen Chen needed to consider was how to place the two Blacklight teleporters on the moon and Mars.

Due to this, Blacklight Biotechnology, while concealing this from the Earth Federation, must use the Ares to transport a batch of industrial robots to the back of the moon, where they could excavate a new underground base. Then, they could start mining helium-3 without any reservations.

This helium-3 was an isotope of the element helium. It was different from ordinary helium in that it contained two protons and one neutron.

Its greatest value was that it could undergo nuclear fusion reactions with hydrogen isotopes. Helium-3 was fuel for nuclear fusion power generation. The energy produced by nuclear fusion reactions with helium-3 was greater than that of traditional deuterium-tritium reactions. During the traditional deuterium-tritium reaction, the generation of nuclear fusion energy also produced a large number of high-energy neutrons and these neutrons could cause radioactive damage to nuclear reactors.

On the contrary, if helium-3 were used as fuel, high-energy protons rather than neutrons were mainly produced. Helium-3 was not only non-radioactive but the reaction process was also easy to control. Therefore, helium-3 was a kind of ideal nuclear fusion fuel that was clean, efficient, and safe.

If the energy return rate of coal was 16, then the energy return rate of the nuclear fission power station built by Chen Chen was 20, and the energy return rate of helium-3 nuclear fusion was as high as 270.

According to calculations, the construction of a 2-million-kilowatt helium-3 nuclear fusion power station consumed only 200 kilograms of helium-3 every year. If helium-3 nuclear fusion power generation was used by the entire world, the total annual power generation would only consume 100 tons of helium-3.

In other words, the helium-3 in lunar soil could supply the earth’s energy needs for thousands of years.

However, the reserves of helium-3 on the earth were small and difficult to exploit and artificial synthesis was expensive. However, there was a large amount of natural helium-3 in the lunar soil. According to calculations, the total resource of helium-3 on the moon was estimated to be 1 million to 5 million tons.

Therefore, during Blacklight Biotechnology’s nuclear fusion project in cooperation with the four continents when the CUERB Project was launched, they had started to lay out lunar scientific research stations for the helium-3 resources on the moon.

The other teleporter was about to be placed at the North Pole of Mars. After all, the South Pole had been occupied by the new scientific expedition team. Building an underground base at the North Pole of Mars, in addition to being used to study Mars, was more of a precaution for the future to Chen Chen, in case of any changes on the earth, at which he could still transfer his property to Mars.

Still, these all need to be laid out slowly, not something that could be done overnight.

However, when Chen Chen was planning to avoid the eyes of the Earth Federation and establish a secret base, new updates came from the four major continents.

On the other side of the Rosen bridge, in the dimension opened in the Indian Ocean, they unexpectedly found a group of survivors.

Fate was truly toying with Chen Chen. After he had unknowingly opened the Rosen bridge, to prevent the four major continents from discovering that the world on the other side was the Resident Evil dimension, he deliberately added some difficulties, so that the four continents would not be able to know the truth for at least a few years. However, who would have expected that when the drones patrolled once again, they came across a group of people who were still barely holding on.

After hearing the news, Chen Chen did not know for a moment whether he should cry or laugh, but because of this discovery, the Lilith Assembly initiated by the four continents was about to begin.

Chen Chen thought for a while and finally went to the meeting room as before. He chose a location at random and then the environmental holographic simulator located in the four corners of the room quickly started up. Chen Chen only felt his vision blurring and when he could see again, he was once again in that meeting room.

Five indistinct figures were sitting around the conference table, each with its own number, from 01 to 05.

This highest-level meeting of the Blacklight Foundation was the so-called “Lilith Assembly”.

It was named this because in the Jewish Bible, Adam’s first wife was Lilith. Currently, the artifact of human foreknowledge was the quantum computer “Adam”. Therefore, this meeting that was also used to safeguard and prevent human beings from becoming extinct was called the Lilith Assembly.

At this time, everyone in the meeting room was obviously in high spirits. 01 said, “I believe all of you have received the latest progress in the exploration of the other dimension. That dimension turned out to be a world where humanity has been destroyed. This is the biggest discovery since we started exploring it!”

“So, how did we discover that?”

Chen Chen asked absently, “As far as I know, isn’t that dimension already occupied by that kind of weird infectious meme?”

“We used a high-altitude reconnaissance plane.”

01 immediately explained, “To better explore the entire world, we mobilized a batch of military reconnaissance planes on all continents. These reconnaissance planes explored the world around the clock, even as far as tens of thousands of kilometers away. The results were shocking. It was discovered that the Flower of Flesh meme didn’t occupy the entire world on the other side, but only a small part of it.

“Once we arrived at the European Continent on the other side...”

03 followed up. “In the European Continent over there, we found countless building remains and even found various familiar cities and buildings such as the collapsed Eiffel Tower, Notre Dame Cathedral, and innumerable landmark buildings that only exist in our reality. It’s only then that we’re sure that the world on the opposite side is also the same Earth!”

Chen Chen sighed secretly, then asked, “What then?”

“Then, we also found that there were traces of human corpses in the wreckage of those cities, so we took the risk and spent a few days using a helicopter to cross tens of thousands of kilometers again, crossing the blockade of the Flower of Flesh, and arrived in the city where human bodies had been found.”

03 then said, “Then, we were shocked to find that those corpses turned out to be zombies that only exist in movies!”

“Zombies?”

Chen Chen’s voice was rather astonished. “Are you kidding me?”

“No, although it’s indeed unbelievable, what I’m saying is the truth.”

03 took a deep breath and spoke again, “Those zombies are in a strange dormant state on ordinary days. In this state, their physiological activities are reduced to a level close to zero. They were passive and quiet until the helicopter had landed, then they were awakened by the noise and rushed toward our foundation soldiers, but were quickly shot dead on the spot.

“However, we subsequently obtained samples of these zombies and analyzed them, finding that there was a special virus in their bodies. This virus is surprisingly similar to the Ebola virus, the Blacklight virus, and other filoviruses. This virus has turned them into the aggressive living dead who like to eat human flesh!”

With that said, a sheet of information appeared in front of everyone out of thin air. Chen Chen scrolled through it casually, only to see that it was an experiment report about the virus.

“This thing is like...”

Chen Chen said softly, “It’s like a movie. What’s the name of that movie?”

“Resident Evil!”

, who had not spoken all this while, suddenly voiced out, turning his blurred face to 01. “The Resident Evil movie from 2002 is a Hollywood movie shot in Northern America. Am I right, Supervisor 01?”

“02, what do you mean?”

01 suddenly became a little unhappy. “Are you suspecting me?”

“Of course not. I just want to ask you, why would a movie shot in Northern America appear in reality?”

’s tone was full of inquiry. “Did those of you in Northern America know about the existence of this dimension for a long time, so you made this movie on purpose? And the location on the other side of the passage is also in Oregon, Northern America. Are these all coincidences?”

“Have we gone mad, resulting in such baffling behavior?”

01 was a little miffed. “Although I don’t understand why this happened, Northern America has nothing to do with this dimension. Whether you believe it or not, that’s the truth!”

“This isn’t the time to blame each other.”

Chen Chen immediately quelled the sparks flying between the two of them and he asked, “This isn’t the time for internal conflicts. After all, the situation on the other side may be more complicated than we thought. What we need to do now is to unite and explore the other world together, right? Supervisors?”

“Yes, 05 is right, we should work together.”

04 agreed to the compromise.

Seeing this, 01 and 02 did not continue to argue.

“Next, we also explored the surrounding areas of the city and as a result, outside a village, we found a piece of cropland that wasn’t neglected.”

03 continued to explain, “So our task force soldiers surmised that there were people living there and this turned out to be the case. Indeed, we found five human survivors in that village.”

“Very good...”

Chen Chen nodded and exclaimed, “This is indeed a massive discovery. The world on the other side of the passage isn’t only the same Earth but also has the same human beings and the same civilization. This is simply a miracle!”

chapters.title: Chapter 517: The President’S Visit
chapters.body:
Chapter 517: The President’S Visit

Chapter 517: The President’s Visit

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

“Name?”

“Danny Brolin...”

“Age.”

“... I’m probably... Over fifty.”

“Why do you say that, don’t you know your own age?”

“Heh heh... I only remember that when the outbreak crisis occurred, I was twenty years old. Now at least thirty years have passed, but does time have any meaning for us survivors?”

“Where are you from?”

“I’m a Scot and my hometown is Linlithgow, Scotland...”

“What’s your relationship with the other four people?”

“Jennifer and the others? They are my wives. We originally wanted a few children but after a previous wife of mine became pregnant, the baby was infected with the ubiquitous T-virus in the womb, and in the end, the baby tore apart her belly... From then on, we didn’t plan to have children anymore. Even when anyone gets pregnant, it’ll be quickly aborted...”

“I heard your wife Jennifer say that she used to have a husband, but you killed him?”

“Yes, all men were protecting themselves. To prevent him from killing me, I killed him first...”

“Then seize his wife?”

“She came willingly because without me, she wouldn’t survive outside for three months.”

“And the same happened with the other wives?”

“No, one of them is my original wife...”

“You mentioned the T-virus before, what is that?”

“It’s the stuff that resulted in those who are neither dead nor alive in the outside world. We call them zombies. Human civilization was destroyed by them. The T-virus caused most humans to become that kind of zombies. Only a few people survived and were hunted by those zombies...”

“They don’t seem to be in large numbers?”

“Hehe... After so many years, most of the wounded zombies have decayed but humans are about to disappear completely too, right?”

“Where did the T-virus that you mentioned come from?”

“Umbrella, of course, it came from Umbrella, that d*mn b*stard corporation. This news was reported on TV before the zombie virus spread, so everyone knows where the T-virus came from. ...”

...

One day later, Chen Chen was sitting in his office on the top floor of the Blacklight Building in the Eco Science City when he received the first-hand interrogation video from the Blacklight Foundation.

In the video, a researcher wearing a white lab coat was sitting at a desk in an empty and airtight interrogation room. Opposite him was a white man with a large bushy beard and an old face, whose eyes were still fierce.

Then there was a lengthy conversation between the two, over three hours in total, covering the man’s past and present, and other trivial matters.

After that, it was the remaining four women. From the interrogation of these women, it was learned that this man named Brolin had killed at least eight survivors, all of whom were men. He seemed to have intentionally killed those of the same sex to prevent his opponents from competing with him for women.

Chen Chen just skimmed the video randomly and moved the progress bar to the end.

Now, the four continents had determined that the real identity of this dimension was the movie Resident Evil and the T-virus had also been acquired by them.

Chen Chen was not too concerned with this because the T-virus had long been something rudimentary to Chen Chen. It was most useful for making organic biological weapons because the T-virus could only be used on living embryos.
