Inside the portrait, two magnificent figures were battling each other on the skies above. One of them was the God of the Divine Fusion Vatican, Alosorthoth, while the one facing off against Alosorthoth was a man.

The man’s appearance was a blur but it could be made out that he had a strange short hairstyle. His facial structure and temperament greatly resembled the mysterious man Niuceus just saw...

There was a tiny passage underneath the portrait that labeled it as “the battle between God and Devil”.

Niuceus’ hands would not stop trembling. He felt as if his body had been electrocuted. That man, that man was...

...

Chen Chen left the city of Laman.

While soaring across the skies, he recalled the events that happened earlier.

It just suddenly came to him that he should plant a seed inside Niuceus, one may call it a whimsical idea or an experiment.

Ever since the Field inside his mind had fused with the psionic power he had acquired from devouring the Consciousness Stealer, he had been thinking about how he could utilize the psionic power.

Based on what he knew so far, a part of these psionic powers overlapped with Field. For instance, both powers granted abilities similar to telekinesis, but there seemed to be another facet to these psionic powers.

Which was why he decided to inject a tiny trace of psionic power into Niuceus to see what would happen.

Just as he expected, Niuceus was not killed by this injection. The moment he planted the seed, he had a faint sensation that Niuceus’ life had become his appendage.

Chen Chen held Niuceus’ life in his hands and could wish his death upon him at any time.

With that said, the psionic power obtained by these common people and the psionic power Chen Chen obtained directly from the Consciousness Stealer were different matters entirely. The psionic power granted to them by the Consciousness Stealer was a simplified version of these powers but the one Chen Chen possessed was authentic.

“This means that the Consciousness Stealer’s ability to consume human consciousness and trigger the fusion death phenomenon we observed should stem from these psionic powers as well...”

Chen Chen ruminated on the fact. If his deduction was correct, then he should be able to achieve the same effect as well. If something were to happen to him that caused his body to perish, he should be able to resurrect on a conscience level by using Laman as a vessel.

Of course, only using Laman himself was not going to suffice. He would need tens of thousands or even more vessels to accumulate enough power for himself to be resurrected.

Chen Chen was intrigued by the prospect of such powers.

Although these psionic powers could not compare to Field in terms of raw strength, the advantage of granting himself the ability to resurrect made it an exemplar ability.

Chen Chen continued heading toward his destination with this in mind and this time, he was heading toward the west. He was curious to see what the Eco Science City and the Spire Experimental Base would look like in this alternate dimension.

Furthermore, while Chen Chen was relaying his instructions to Laman, a bold idea suddenly occurred to him. He wondered, what would happen if he managed to bring the other half of himself to this world as well?

The Consciousness Stealer in this world had so much time to let its strength fester that Chen Chen was not confident in his chances against it. In this case, he could borrow the strength from the other world to combat it.

This world was a lost cause and its surviving civilization was nowhere better, but there were still enough assets here to strive for...

The task of traversing from one dimension to another would be considered nigh impossible for most people, but this was because they were not Chen Chen.

The reasoning for this was simple. It was because Chen Chen had a logic-defying tool in the USB drive.

With this in mind, Chen Chen continued accelerating, doubling, tripling, even quadrupling the speed of sound itself!

Chen Chen maintained his speed at three times the speed of sound. Although he could go faster than this, the Field consumption from this point on would soar to a point that it would be counterproductive to do so. This was due to the difference in atmospheric concentration between Earth and Mars whereas it was a lot more difficult to accelerate on Earth.

Even so, it would only take an hour and a half for Chen Chen to travel from Niger to Namibia. The two regions were separated by a 4650 kilometers stretch and if Chen Chen went another approximately 500 kilometers further, he would arrive at the Eco Science City.

Chen Chen spent the next hour and a half flying across many regions, disregarding whatever was unimportant to him at the moment. In usual circumstances, it would take someone several months to travel such a great distance.

Across the horizon, the endless stretch of ocean was beginning to come into view. Even the air itself began to dampen.

Chen Chen could smell the salt of the sea even at great altitudes.

When Chen Chen finally arrived at his destination, the look on his face was not a pleasant one.

There was nothing but collapsed ruins where the Eco Science City once was. Piles on top of piles of rubbles and wreckage were lined up along the coast. Most of the foundation of the buildings along the coast had given away to the beating of the waves over the years. Meanwhile, most of the metallic materials had been salvaged.

The Eco Science City had been abandoned for several centuries at this point.

Despite the desolate outlook of the city, Chen Chen did not give up and continued searching for the underground entrances to the Spire Experimental Base. After sweeping through the area, he managed to find several such entrances. However, most of these entrances had caved in as well, completely burying the tram and its platform underneath.

Left without a choice, Chen Chen went for the ocean and dove in.

Using Field, he created a three-meter-wide bubble around himself to allow himself to breathe. After that, he dove for the bottom of the ocean and soon found the entrance that was now hidden underneath a large coral reef population.

Chen Chen paved through the coral reef without hesitation and soon discovered that even the tunnel leading to the Spire Experimental Base was now overflowing with water.

Chen Chen had a bad feeling about this but pressed forward nonetheless. After passing through three large gates that were all left open and arriving at the end of the tunnel, there was a gigantic collection of boulders blocking his path.

With that, Chen Chen decided it was time to give up. It seemed like the Spire Experimental Base had collapsed entirely.

chapters.title: Chapter 555: Clues
chapters.body:
Chapter 555: Clues

Chapter 555: Clues

Upon returning to the surface, Chen Chen felt deeply conflicted by his findings.

In the real world, he had successfully defeated the Consciousness Stealer and restored peace and balance to mankind. However, it seemed like he was defeated in this parallel world.

The cost of his defeat was the collapse of modern civilization and the deaths of billions of population. All these were not his primary concern. What he wanted to know was what happened to his parents in this parallel dimension.

For Chen Chen who had always been protective of his parents, this was a lot to stomach.

Since a staggering four centuries had passed, chances were that all of the people from his generation had turned to ashes and dust. This was a completely new and foreign world for Chen Chen.

Knowing that the only thing resembling a connection between himself and this world had been severed, Chen Chen did not see a reason to remorse over this loss anymore. Right now, what he needed to do was to figure out how he was going to defeat the Consciousness Stealer in this world and to open a passage between the two worlds so that he could invade from the other world.

Before accomplishing any of this, there was one more matter that he had to attend to, and that was to take a look at this Joint Resistance Army they spoke of. If possible, he would like to assimilate this faction for his purposes.

With this in mind, Chen Chen departed from the now ravaged Eco Science City and continued toward the other side of the Atlantic Ocean.

...

Cyric was a high-ranking officer of the troops of the Joint Military Forces.

The high-ranking officer governed over a fleet of two destroyers and one cruiser. They patrolled the southern Atlantic all year round, curbing the smuggling and infiltration operations of followers of the Consciousness Stealer from the opposite shore.

The ships under his command were extremely old, some of them were built before any of the members of the crew had been born at all. It was these fleets that managed to hold off the infiltration of the Divine Fusion Empire. These ships were the lifeline of the tens of millions of survivors on the continent.

By this point, Cyric was already well into his retirement age. The reason he was graced with the role of the commander of this fleet in the first place was that his ancestors used to be fleet commanders in Northern America. The art of fleet and Battalion government had been passed down in his family through the generations.

Cyric wore a washed-out uniform and looked over the ocean from the command room, occasionally picking up the binoculars to inspect the horizon.

During another one of his routine inspections, he spotted a tiny black dot rising across the horizon.

It was something that slowly crept up from beneath the horizon. It would not be observable at this distance under regular circumstances but since they were in the wide-open sea, they were able to spot enemies approaching from a greater distance.

It seemed like the black dot was rapidly approaching the fleet’s location.

At first, Cyric thought it was his old eyes deceiving him. After getting a closer look for several seconds longer, he began to frown. There was no mistaking it. This unknown black dot was slowly growing larger.

It was clear now that this black dot was advancing toward their location.

“Radar!”

Cyric quickly reminded himself of the radar system and turned to inspect the monitor, only to see a disappointing, pitch-black screen staring back at him. He forgot that the radar system had broken down more than a month ago.

This ship was simply too old and should have been decommissioned decades ago. The advanced technological systems invented by their predecessors were a lost craft now and the ship itself was a scrambled project comprised of dismantled parts of other ancient ships. The best they could do was to put these pieces together for there was no way to recreate these advanced machinations.

With the way things were now, there was simply no way to repair the high-precision radar system that had broken down since a month ago.

After evaluating the situation, Cyric immediately pressed a large red button on the side of the control panel to put the entire fleet on alert and into a state of emergency. Meanwhile, he continued to observe the approaching black dot with his binoculars and was shocked by what he saw – was it a person?

It was someone soaring across the skies!

“A psionicist!”

Cyric felt his heart drop upon verifying this. The three ships of the fleet had prepared themselves for combat just in time as troops of gunners entered the artillery compartments and aimed the barrel at the dark figure!

“Hold!”

Cyric glared at the humanoid figure that was approaching at unprecedented speed. It had been no more than thirty seconds since his initial spotting of the target and it was already entering the borders of their attack range.

“Fire!”

Decades of training had honed Cyric’s senses to perfection. He had identified the perfect time to fire!

An array of ten Vulcan cannons unleashed a terrific roar that tore through the skies as it fired torrents of cannon shells into the approaching figure to cut off its advance. There was not a single member in the Joint Resistance Army who was uninformed of a psionicist’s abilities. It was an occult source of power that came from the Consciousness Stealer. It was this power that helped the Divine Fusion Empire suppress the Joint Military Forces and drive them to the west coast of the Indian Ocean.

Bright flares illuminated the sky above and weaved large nets of cannon shells within the firing range of the fleet. Despite all this, the approaching figure showed the slightest intention of stopping. Instead, it charged through the array of shells and crashed into the deck of the flagship within moments!

“Bang!”

There was a deafening crash. The invader had arrived at the deck!

“Protect the general!”

A swarm of soldiers rushed toward the position of the intruder with rifles in hand. They saw a slender figure rising from the deck. His eyes were dark and lacked any sense of warmth. The moment they met his eyes, they became overwhelmed with an indescribable fear.

“Bring me to the highest-rank commanding officer of the fleet.”

The man spoke idly, completely disregarding the soulless barrels aimed at him.

“Get him!”

Someone among the soldiers who seemed to be their commanding officer gave the order. With orders given from their superiors, the soldiers that were arrested with fear clenched their teeth and executed the orders with fierce discipline.

The man only frowned the moment he saw the soldiers swarming on him. In an instant, an invisible force swept outward with this man at its center. Everybody within a fifty-meter radius was completely frozen in place!

As one may expect, this man who had just traveled across the Atlantic Ocean was Chen Chen.

Chen Chen immediately activated his Field and swept through the flagship. It did not take him long before he identified the highest-ranking officer, which was the general at the bridge of the ship. He slowly went toward the bridge and approached the general.

“Who are you?”

At the moment, Cyric may appear composed but deep down, he was awestruck by this mysterious invader’s magnificent display of power. He did have experience with psionicists users in the past. The only reason that the Divine Fusion Empire that had forsaken the advancement of technology was able to suppress the Joint Resistance Army in the first place was in no small part thanks to the psionicists.

If not for these psionicists, the Joint Resistance Army, even with their crippled technology, would have overwhelmed the Divine Fusion Empire a long time ago,

With that said, even advanced-level psionicists could nullify the firepower of regular cannons at most. This invader had managed to power through their concentrated bombardment. What sort of a human being was capable of such feats?

“I come in peace. I don’t belong to the Divine Fusion Empire.”

Chen Chen did not beat around the bush and addressed the heart of the matter directly. “I come here with a singular purpose and that is to meet the highest-ranked commanding officer in your resistance army. There’s something I need from your forces.”

“That’s impossible!”

Cyric refused this preposition without even considering it. “I won’t bring you to our commanding officer even if you threaten to kill all of us. It’s simply impossible!”

Chen Chen frowned. There was nothing else he could use to threaten them and there was no value in killing them since he was not here to exact any form of vengeance. He stomached his discontent with the situation and stated, “In that case, I won’t force your hand. I’m sure you have methods to contact your superior, in that case, tell them to inform the resistance general that there’s somebody who wants to meet him and that his name is Chen Chen.”

“Chen Chen?”

Cyric felt strangely familiar with this standard Chinese name but knew that this was no time to ask unnecessary questions. He hesitated for a moment before asking, “Could I ask why you want to speak with the general of our joint resistance army?”

“Just to form an alliance.”

Chen Chen remarked almost too casually, “I’m sure you people want to destroy the Divine Fusion Empire and the Consciousness Stealer as well. I can help you with that.”

Cyric once again fell into deep thought upon hearing this. He was debating whether he should do as Chen Chen instructed.

“I come in good faith.”

Chen Chen saw that Cyric was on the verge of making up his mind so he immediately struck when the metal was still hot. “All you need to do is to get in touch with him. Whether to join with me in an alliance or not is entirely up to your superiors to decide.”

“Alright, I can pass the message for you...”

Chen Chen’s persuasion seemed to have worked as Cyric returned with a firm nod and promised him, “But this place is some distance away from land. I’ll need to take the fleet back to land before I can get in touch with my superiors. If it doesn’t inconvenience you, you’re welcome to stay on the ship...”

“Excellent.”

Chen Chen smiled easily. Immediately after, the soldiers who were nailed to their spots suddenly felt the invisible tension lifted off them as they regained control of their bodies.

The rigid atmosphere on the ship was suddenly lifted off like a switch being flicked. They immediately bolted to the bridge and eyed Chen Chen cautiously.

“Prepare a room for the gentleman!”

Cyric immediately ordered.

The chief officer on deck immediately stepped up to the task. He approached Chen Chen, saluted, and informed, “Sir, this way please!”

Chen Chen nodded courteously and left the bridge with the chief officer.

After the strange invader had left, Cyric and the gathered soldiers finally heaved a sigh of relief. A deputy commander asked with a grave look on his face, “Boss, are you going to do as he asked?”

“Do we have any other choice?”

Cyric turned the question around on the vice general. “You and I both know that he can sink our fleet faster than you can say Mayday. Since he’s not doing that yet, we shouldn’t provoke him unnecessarily.”

With that, he shot a look at several other high-ranking officers in his fleet, signaling them to join him in another room.

“Chen Chen...”

After they entered the room and had some privacy, Cyric lit a cigarette, took a hungry drag, and asked, “Don’t you guys feel a strange sense of familiarity with this name?”

“From what I can tell, it’s a very standard Chinese name.”

One of the deputy commanders answered, “But I believe I’ve heard of the name somewhere else as well, I think... I think this name was once regularly mentioned in the earlier history of our Joint Resistance Army.”

The others did not seem to be too intrigued with this matter but Cyric, on the other hand, suddenly recalled something. A startled look suddenly came upon his face. “Could it be... Could it be him?”

...

Chen Chen would be a fool to take their word for it and believe that they did not have any long-distance communication facilities. Even if all other modern technology implementations had been decommissioned, they should at least have retained a common invention like radio communication.

Still, he decided it was more worthwhile to not call them out on it. What mattered at the end of the day was the end goal. The process of attaining it was not a major concern.

The chief officer took him to a lounge that seemed to have belonged to another officer just recently but was urgently made available again. When he entered, he could still smell the lingering smell of tobacco in the air.

The cruiser was not remarkably large, spanning only nearly a hundred meters and its displacement could not have exceeded 50,000 tons. With that said, it should suffice for combating the Divine Fusion Empire.

It seemed like the Joint Resistance Army still possessed a satisfactory level of technology after all.

With that said, it was nothing particularly outstanding either. From the previous engagement, Chen Chen already noticed that the cannons were manually operated and he did not notice a single artillery shell. It was evident that the industry system had regressed considerably.

It was still a mystery what had happened to the Northern American and South American Continents. In their heyday, the Divine Fusion Empire would crumble within half a month if they were confronted with modern weapons. Their medieval inventions could never hold up to modern mortars.

Based on what Chen Chen had gathered so far, it was the Divine Fusion Empire that currently had the upper hand. All the Joint Resistance Army could do was retaliate and hold its ground. If not for the vast ocean separating the two continents, there would be no Joint Resistance Army to speak of by now.

Now that Chen Chen was here, he may as well make the best of this situation. He sat on the bed and began formulating his plans.

Two days later.

When Cyric’s fleet returned to anchor by the port, there was already an armed force stationed at the port waiting for them.

From the deck, Chen Chen saw groups of soldiers in military uniforms holding rifles, standing in formation on the harbor. However, their weapons and equipment were rather crude, for lack of a better word. All they had were standard military uniforms while bulletproof vests and helmets were nowhere to be seen. Furthermore, the only weapons he saw were standard-issued AK weapons.

There was also a line of tanks behind these soldiers, but they were similarly old and beaten up. The entire troop combined to approximately three thousand soldiers.

Chen Chen glanced in the direction of the sky and immediately determined his approximate position. It should be somewhere along the coast of Brazil.

When Chen Chen finally announced his presence, several general-ranked elderly members stepped to the head of the troops.

“Sir.”

The general who seemed to be the prime authority of the army was the first to step forward. He sized Chen Chen up with his seasoned eye then extended his arm for a handshake. “I’m the general of the South American sector of the Joint Resistance Army, Anderson Tobias.”

“And I’m Chen Chen.”

Chen Chen shook the general’s hands.

“Forgive my manners.”

General Tobias suddenly remarked, “And correct me if I’m wrong, but I believe that the name Chen Chen belongs to the president of Blacklight Biotechnology who once led mankind in a fight against the Consciousness Stealer 378 years ago or am I wrong?”

“You know who I am?”

Chen Chen looked at the general in utter disbelief. It was just as he expected, the Blacklight Biotechnology that he founded would not fold easily even in this alternate world.

chapters.title: Chapter 556: Blacklight City
chapters.body:
Chapter 556: Blacklight City

Chapter 556: Blacklight City

Chen Chen followed the other party and got into an off-road vehicle. The engine was started and they began to drive inland.

On their journey, Chen Chen saw a city.

Chen Chen called it a city but it was a ruined city site. It had been indeed a city back then but now, all that had crumbled. Buildings with more than five floors had long collapsed due to disrepair and the buildings that remained seemed to have been transformed into a residential area.

Around the city, fields had been developed.

The group did not invite Chen Chen into the city. After all, Chen Chen’s origin was still unknown. They could only take Chen Chen to a military base and used it as a place to receive Chen Chen.

Although this military base stationed in the wasteland seemed a bit complacent, a scan of Chen Chen’s Field revealed rows of snipers and hidden troops.

“It’s a bit crude, please don’t take offense.”

After they arrived at the military base, Anderson personally received Chen Chen and asked his lieutenant to leave the room.

Chen Chen glanced at the layout of the room, then sat down on the sofa on the side.

Anderson also sat on the other side. He went straight to the point. “Your Excellency Chen Chen, are you related to the Chen Chen of Blacklight Biotechnology?”

Chen Chen answered without hesitation, “Perhaps you won’t believe it, but I’m Chen Chen.”

Anderson was silent for a while when he heard these words, but he did not seem too surprised. “I don’t know if you have any evidence? Please understand, it’s not that I don’t believe you, but as far as we know, Chen Chen of Blacklight Biotechnology had died 378 years ago...”

“I’m quite puzzled myself.”

Chen Chen smiled. “If I remember correctly, when the catastrophe of the Consciousness Stealer occurred, I couldn’t have been that famous.”

Anderson was a little taken aback when he heard this. He did a double-take. “Didn’t you come from the Divine Fusion Empire? Don’t you know that the name Chen Chen has spread there widely long ago? Any worshipper of the Consciousness Stealer would know that the name Chen Chen is synonymous with the devil.”

At that, Anderson gave a holler. A guard came in and Anderson asked him to get some books.

More than ten minutes later, the book The Legendary Tales of the Divine Fusion Empire was delivered to Chen Chen.

“It’s all here.”

Anderson put on his glasses, turned to one of the pages, and then handed it to Chen Chen. “This is it.”

“The battle between God and the Devil?”

Chen Chen squinted his eyes when he heard this. He only saw that the page showed a picture with a style similar to an oil painting and there were two figures depicted in it. The figure closer to the viewer was not human and only one-fifth of its body was shown. On the opposite of this figure was the figure of a man.

Although the picture was a bit blurry, Chen Chen still made out at once that this figure seemed to be him...

Seeing this, Chen Chen could not help raising his eyebrows.

“Sure enough, your appearance is indeed very similar to this image.”

Anderson carefully observed Chen Chen a few times. “If only 30% of me believed in you before, I’m now 50% convinced. In the legend of the Divine Fusion Empire, Chen Chen was the first psionicist among humankind and the first human being to pledge loyalty to the Consciousness Stealer, but later he rebelled. To pursue a stronger power, he confronted the Consciousness Stealer in the sky and was eventually killed by the Consciousness Stealer...”

“Borrowing the story of Jesus and Judas from the Bible?”

Chen Chen asked with a grin.

“Yes...”

Anderson nodded. “Of course, few of us in the Joint Military Forces believe this legend, but the name Chen Chen has become a household name all over the world.”

Seeing that Chen Chen remained silent, Anderson suddenly tilted his head and said again, “If you’re Chen Chen, then Blacklight City should be able to verify your identity.”

“Blacklight City?”

“Blacklight City is one of the five major forces of the Joint Resistance Army.”

Anderson seemed to understand why Chen Chen had no idea of anything. He just explained assuredly, “The reason we’re called the Joint Resistance Army is that we’re composed of the four major continents and Blacklight Biotechnology of the previous era. Blacklight City is one of the human cities built by the Blacklight Biotechnology force.”

“That’s enough.”

Chen Chen took a deep breath when he heard this, then stood up decisively and said, “Give me the position of Blacklight City.”

Anderson’s eyes flickered and he once again asked the guard at the door to bring a map. Chen Chen pored over the map, only to find that the location of the so-called Blacklight City turned out to be in Greenland.

“Only the severe cold can resist the attack of the Consciousness Stealer.”

Anderson recounted softly, “Although all fusion deaths of the infection had disappeared 378 years ago after the Great Fusion, the Consciousness Stealer also became extremely powerful. The world, having lost more than 3 billion people, had to go up against a mature Consciousness Stealer...

“I heard from my grandfather that the war between humans and the Consciousness Stealer lasted three months. The most powerful weapon of humankind, the nuclear bomb, fell like rain on the ground at the feet of the Consciousness Stealer. Even so, all this could not hold back the enemy’s footsteps. It destroyed all human civilization and plowed the entire human world. Then it ceased moving near the Hawaiian Island in the Pacific Ocean, sank into the depths of the sea, and went into hiding...

“However, just when the remaining humans rose from the rubble and were celebrating having escaped, we discovered that among the first batch of infected people in Africa and Europe, there were some who did not die in the Great Fusion. The Consciousness Stealer had spared them and turned them into its worshippers...

“So, a force called the Divine Fusion Empire was established.”

Chen Chen listened silently. He stood up after listening to all this, then turned and walked outside.

However, when Chen Chen reached the door, he suddenly paused. “General Anderson, which force do you belong to?”

“I...”

Anderson opened his mouth but suddenly fell silent.

Seeing this, a murderous intent flashed in Chen Chen’s eyes and the atmosphere in the entire office suddenly became tense.

“Crack, crack...”

Anderson noticed that the cracks were growing in the glass of the window, the photo frame on the table, and the water cup. At the same time, he suddenly felt his heart pounding as if something terrifying was about to happen in the next second.

Seeing this, Anderson finally smiled bitterly. He hurriedly said, “I was born in Liberty City under the jurisdiction of Northern America. I was appointed by Speaker Morrison, one of the five speakers of the supreme council of the Joint Resistance Army...”

Hearing this sentence, Chen Chen did not speak again and walked out of the office directly.

As Chen Chen left, the atmosphere in the room immediately returned to normal. Anderson looked at the cracked water glass on the table in a bewildered panic. If he had not said anything just now, the other party would have killed him...

“Could he be the ancestor of the Chen family in Blacklight City?”

Anderson’s eyes flickered. “In that case, the legend of the Blacklight City is probably true. Chen Chen didn’t die back then. He just chose to freeze himself and waited for the day to make his comeback.

“And now, that day has arrived...”

...

Chen Chen ignored the stares of the many people in the military base. He just pondered silently while walking toward the outside world.

Through his superb understanding of psychology, Chen Chen could ascertain that the top commander of the Northern American division did not lie and everything he said was true.

However, some of his main points were rather fishy. He decisively exposed the location of Blacklight City, but he did not provide Chen Chen with the location of other cities.

Along with the flickering look in his eyes, Chen Chen could essentially surmise that infighting was probably involved.

Indeed, human sorrows and joys were not always interlinked. As long as there were people, there would be conflict. Even if they were under the same force, there were constant internal fights.

After confirming Chen Chen’s identity, Anderson decisively exposed the location of Blacklight City, taking advantage of the situation to lead Chen Chen toward that city.

What Anderson had in mind could not be any clearer.

Therefore, Chen Chen asked which faction Anderson belonged to. Since Anderson was treating Chen Chen as a hazard, he had better be prepared for a backlash from Chen Chen. If he did not even tell Chen Chen his faction at that time, Chen Chen would indeed take action immediately and kill Anderson.

If Chen Chen was feeling up to it, he would even directly flatten the entire military base as a proclamation of his return.

Although doing so would be unreasonable, Chen Chen had not intended to reason with anyone because he had shown the other party enough courtesy beforehand.

“Blacklight City?”

Chen Chen murmured silently. His expression flashed twice and then he flew up directly before the shocked eyes of many soldiers, accelerated with a “bang” and disappeared at the end of the sky a few seconds later...

After one day.

Chen Chen came to Greenland, which was the largest island in the world, covering an area of 2.17 million square kilometers. However, the entire island was covered in snow all year round. It was the closest place in the world to the North Pole, even closer than the North Sea Continent.

The temperature in the coastal area could reach above zero in summer and the inland part was frozen all year round. More than 80% of the entire island was covered by ice. It was in the southernmost coastal zone of such a harsh environment that a city stood.

It was different from the cities that Chen Chen saw in the Divine Fusion Empire before. Although it was remote, it had a more civilized air. Whether it was the huge civilian port here or the tall buildings on the inner coast, it all appeared more civilized.

Chen Chen stood high in the sky, silently looking at the brightly lit city under his feet. He did not expect that electricity was still running here and at the same time, cars could be seen passing through the city.

However, unlike reality, the cars here were very small, more like old people’s scooters.

Chen Chen did not yet disturb the city. Taking advantage of the darkness, he slowly descended from a high altitude, landed in a dark corner, and then looked around.

The streets here were also made of concrete, but the sides of the streets were lined with banks of snow and the pedestrians on both sides were also walking in a hurry. They wore baggy winter clothes and shuttled through the city. Many people’s faces reflected the color of wind and frost.

Although it still could not be compared to reality, it was much better than the world of the Divine Fusion Empire.

There was another very eye-catching aspect, that was, there was a large number of Asian people living here. At a casual glance, Chen Chen saw that most of them were Caucasian or Asian while there were few African people.

“Heh, interesting.”

Chen Chen whispered. He walked into the street and then followed the traffic toward the center of the city.

A few kilometers away from him, there was a huge building. According to the layout, that should be the city hall. Chen Chen could still see a familiar logo on the top of that building.

It was a black circle with faint yellow light radiating on the outside, all of which comprised the logo of Blacklight Biotechnology.

...

“Beep, beep, beep...”

At the moment Chen Chen appeared in the city, deep in the city hall, in a room full of thousands of screens, there was a sudden rush of notifications.

This room seemed to control the surveillance of the entire city. At this time, the surveillance feeds had disappeared and turned into a unified image. Chen Chen’s face appeared on the screen, which was quickly enlarged, and then a grid was overlaid, framing and separating Chen Chen’s face.

“Important personnel identified, X-112 beginning analysis.”

A female voice rang from the speaker. “Starting comparison with the database... Comparing...”

Then, another three-dimensional face of Chen Chen’s appeared on the side and was compared to the framed image. “Comparison similarity 95%... Target verified — chairman of Blacklight Biotechnology Ltd., the highest authority of Blacklight Biotechnology — Chen Chen.”

At this time, the people working in the surveillance center suddenly erupted in chaos. Everyone wore a look of shock and surprise. One of the older men immediately ordered, “The central control computer X-112 has detected an abnormality. Report it immediately. Little Zhang, go and notify the director, hurry up!”

Hearing this command, a young man on the side nodded immediately and ran out of the surveillance room.

chapters.title: Chapter 557: The Chen Family
chapters.body:
Chapter 557: The Chen Family

Chapter 557: The Chen Family

Deep in the night, Chen Lin, who was nearly 100 years old, had finished his day’s work. He closed his eyes in satisfaction, waited on by several beautiful maids.

As one of the highest authorities of Blacklight City, Chen Lin had an incomparably revered position. This was an apocalyptic age where humanity’s previous civilization system had long disappeared and replaced by the law of the jungle, where the strong commanded respect.

All of this began more than 380 years ago.

More than 380 years ago, a private company called Blacklight Biotechnology emerged momentously and monopolized the entire pharmaceutical industry at an incredible speed. At the same time, they also extended their reach to electronic finance, mineral resources, military aerospace, and various other fields. By the time everyone else realized what was going on, the foundations of this behemoth corporation had already been laid and it squeezed out a new slice of the pie for itself in this world that had long been divided by established forces.

According to the analysis of later generations, this company had created many of the world’s records for companies — it was the largest multinational company in the history of human civilization, the company with the most technology patents in the history of humankind, and also the richest company in the world...

Moreover, it was the first and only private company in the world that could be on par with the four continents!

Legend said that Blacklight Biotechnology even had its own nuclear weapons and a military system comparable to any major continent.

This company was so massive that even if civilization was destroyed by alien creatures such as the Consciousness Stealer, it still retained a stable foundation. In the first hundred years of the apocalypse, it decisively shouldered the dawn of human civilization. Even the four major continents had been roped in.

Although this situation was declining due to the gradual exhaustion of its resources, at least until now, the Chen family of Blacklight City was still one of the five indispensable forces of the Joint Resistance Army. It was a tower of strength in the resistance against the Divine Fusion Empire...

In the Blacklight City built by Blacklight Biotechnology, the Chen family was even more dominant and aloof, just like the royal family of the feudal era, dominating the destiny of millions of people in the entire city.

Chen Lin was one such member of the Chen family.

He was a fourth-generation son of the Chen family. Although he had not formally entered the family committee, he was at least one of the figures who were presented to the public. His job was to help the family committee handle the internal affairs of the entire city. His level was that of an internal secretary-general.

However, just as he was falling asleep now, some fool started knocking on his door in a very urgent manner as if something of extreme importance had happened.

Chen Lin sat up, a little annoyed. He ignored the cooing of the maids next to him. Instead, he took a bath towel and wrapped it around his lower body, then walked angrily to the door.

“Who is it, don’t you know it’s midnight?”

Chen Lin opened the door furiously but saw that his assistant was standing outside the door in a panic. Before he could speak, his assistant said, “Secretary-General Chen, the committee wants you to go to the family meeting room immediately!”

Hearing these words, Chen Lin’s anger evaporated instantly and he shuddered. “What happened, did the Divine Fusion Empire send someone to attack us secretly?”

“I don’t know, but it seems to be an urgent matter.

The assistant replied, “I couldn’t reach you by phone, so they informed me to visit and summon you immediately, the sooner the better!”

After hearing these words, Chen Lin finally shut up. He closed the door again, then walked directly to the bedroom, dressed quickly before the surprised eyes of the maids, and walked out of the door toward the elevator.

Most of the core members of the Chen family lived in the central building of Blacklight City, the Blacklight Building. This was a fifty-story fortress-type building. At the same time, it was also the city hall and central system, which controlled the operations of the entire city.

Therefore, in just ten minutes, Chen Lin had arrived at the top floor of the Blacklight Building. At this time, there were already several bodyguards standing at the door. These were the guards nurtured by the Chen family since childhood and there were even some leftover androids and XTN robots from the old era inside, though only a few of them.

At Chen Lin’s arrival, the two guards immediately opened the door of the meeting room. Chen Lin walked in before he could even check his appearance, but when he saw the situation inside the room, he suddenly stopped breathing.

In the conference room, seven or eight people had already sat down at this time. Most of these people maintained their middle-aged appearance, with an aura of majesty and seniority on their faces. These people were none other than the top figures in Blacklight City. At the same time, they were also members of the Chen family’s committee.

At this time, hearing the noise at the door, many people turned their heads in unison. When they saw Chen Lin, some people immediately frowned. Chen Lin was already a little late.

If he were outside, few people would dare to shoot such a look at Chen Lin, but here, he could only keep quiet with his tail between his legs.

“Well, the last person is here. Let me explain the situation we’re encountering now.”

On the podium in the conference room, an old man who had already shown a few signs of aging suddenly spoke. Even Chen Lin had not seen him often. He only knew that this old man was a second-generation member of the Chen family, who was also the former mayor of Blacklight City more than 100 years ago.

As the Chen family had high-tech equipment left over from the Blacklight Biotechnology in the previous era — the Blacklight Fully-automated Medical Platform — the members of the Chen family had extremely long life spans. The oldest was even more than 300 years old. Chen Lin had even heard that some older members of the Chen family had frozen themselves long ago, with plans to wake up again someday in the future.

At this time, the four elders on the stage were the four second-generation family members of the Chen family. They were the core of the family committee and the true helm of the Chen family.

“Just now, we noticed a special figure on Blacklight Avenue, the main road of the city.”

The old man said and a video immediately appeared behind him. In the video, there was a young man, probably only twenty-five or twenty-six years old, with short hair and an icy, focused expression.

At this time, he was walking slowly on Blacklight Avenue, holding a newspaper in his hand and turning his head to look at everything around him from time to time.

The most unusual thing was that he was wearing a thin linen coat. They all knew that late at night in Blacklight City, the outside world was more than 30 degrees below zero, but this person did not seem to feel cold at all. It was as if he was dropping by someone’s house for a casual visit.

While Chen Lin was sitting in the group, he suddenly realized that the face of this young man was a bit familiar, but he was sure that he had never seen this man before.

“This person suddenly appeared in our city. No matter whether it’s the checkpoint, the city gate or other places, there are no records of his clearance.”

The old man continued to speak, “But the strange thing is, the moment he was photographed by the main control intelligence, it issued a special notice. It said that this person is the highest authority in Blacklight City and his name is Chen Chen...”

“Chen Chen!”

Hearing this name, not only Chen Lin but also the rest shifted their expressions because this name was too familiar. Everyone in the Chen family had heard of this name because its owner was none other than the founder of the Chen family and also the true founder of Blacklight Biotechnology!

“Impossible, Chen Chen... Didn’t he die when he was fighting the Consciousness Stealer?”

Someone immediately asked, “Could it be that the main control intelligence has made a mistake?”

“I hope so too.”

The old man shot a meaningful look at the questioner. “But I wouldn’t bank on it. Together with other people on the committee, I compared this image with a previous photo of Chen Chen, but we found that the person in the photo is very similar to the person in the video now.”

“So, Chen Chen... Our great-grandfather isn’t dead?”

Another member of the Chen family, who was of the fourth generation like Chen Lin, asked immediately, “Is it just like the rumors say, that he also chose to freeze himself and wait until now to appear?”

“Impossible!”

“This person must be fake!”

“Maybe it’s a scheme by the Divine Fusion Empire...”

“Won’t we find out simply by interrogating him?”

Everyone spoke one after another and for a while, the entire conference room was buzzing noisily.

“Silence!”

The old man picked up a wooden gavel and banged it vigorously. The loud sound reverberated in the conference room, suppressing everyone’s conversation. “It doesn’t matter who this guy is now. All of us here are core members of the Chen family. What I want you to do is very simple, that is to stop any news of this from getting out. Then we’ll apprehend this guy. If he’s fake, then we’ll naturally take the appropriate countermeasures.”

The old man was silent for a while and then continued. “Forget about whether he’s real or fake. To prevent turmoil in Blacklight City, you must all act immediately to block the news and not fall into the trap of the Divine Fusion Empire!”

“Understood, no problem.”

Next to the old man, a member of the family committee nodded and said blankly.

“Me too, I’ll help cover this up...”

Everyone expressed their agreement, even Chen Lin. He controlled the internal affairs of the entire city, so he was allowed to participate in this meeting.

“This guy has gone through four intersections and is less than a thousand meters away from the Blacklight Building.”

The old man finally ordered, “To prevent any accidents, I’ll send our family’s secret force, the Black Knights, to personally capture him. Now, the meeting is adjourned!”

Chen Lin was shocked when he heard this last announcement!

Black Knights!

This was the second time Chen Lin had heard the name of this secret army, but as a core member of the family, he had heard of the existence of this army more than 30 years ago. This army was one of the strongest cornerstones of the Chen family. It was said that it was the existence of this secret army that allowed the Chen family to survive more than three hundred years and still prosper to this day!

Now, the committee was even going to send out the Black Knights? It looked like they were anxious...

Chen Lin pondered as he walked out of the conference room. Of course, he could understand what the higher-ups were thinking. Although Chen Chen was the founder of Blacklight Biotechnology and the biological elder brother of the first-generation ancestor of the Chen family, the city was still built gradually by the members of the Chen family.

Now, if this Chen Chen became the highest authority of the city, did it not mean that their control over the entire Blacklight City was wrenched out of their grasp? The group of people in the family committee had lived lavishly for more than three hundred years, how could they be willing to hand over power to others?

Therefore, Chen Lin was almost certain that whether that person was the founder of Blacklight Biotechnology or not, it was likely he would be labeled a fake, and it was not impossible he would be killed off...

Still, although Chen Lin had figured out the intentions of the committee, he had no inclination to right this injustice. As a superior in this city who affected the rise and fall of human civilization, he certainly understood the importance of an iron-fisted rule. If this was the real Chen Chen, no matter what, the order of the city would be shaken up violently.

Whether Chen Lin could even retain his current position was another question...

He was an authority figure, both in public and in private. Someone in authority naturally preferred a stable order. After all, this was all about self-interest.

Thinking of this, Chen Lin could not help shaking his head and mourning for Chen Chen for a second, then he stopped thinking about it. He only needed to focus on his own tasks.

...

Chen Chen stood on the edge of the crossroad holding a newspaper, ignoring the peculiar, surprised gazes of everyone passing by.

He slowly raised his head and looked at the surveillance camera above his head.

As early as twenty minutes ago, those cameras all pointed at him and took pictures of Chen Chen wherever he went. It was a little amusing.

Now that such a long time has passed, Chen Chen still did not notice any response from the city and he immediately understood everything.

It appeared that some did not welcome his arrival...

Chen Chen was not too surprised. He lowered his head and looked at the newspaper in his hand. At this time, he had obtained a lot of useful information from the newspaper. For example, the city was controlled by the Chen family and the Chen family was like a royal family, in charge of almost every position in the entire city from top to bottom. Outsiders could only serve in some departments that were relatively less powerful.

This was no longer a monopoly but a dictatorship, a reversal of history.

However, Chen Chen did not think it was wrong for them to go backward in history.

He understood that, if this was the process of continuous advancement of human civilization, turning back the wheel of history was naturally asking for death.

However, now that the level of human civilization had declined significantly, it was normal for this kind of system to regress because in this apocalypse, the more advanced systems had no room for survival and the law of the jungle became more applicable instead.

This was all about having a specific analysis of specific issues.

At the same time, Chen Chen also came across many introductions of the Chen family members in the newspaper. At present, most of the members of the Chen family who appeared in the public eye were fourth-generation Chen family members, but even the fourth generation consisted mostly of those in their seventies and eighties, and some were even more than a century old.

To Chen Chen’s surprise, the first generation of the Chen family was not his parents but his own younger brother, Chen Zeyu.

Chen Chen still thought of his middling little brother as a three-year-old child in front of his parents, but now it seemed that Blacklight Biotechnology had left behind some resources. Chen Zeyu must still have been pretty capable to transform all that into the current Blacklight City...

However, since he had not planned to recognize Chen Chen as his elder brother, Chen Chen did not need to value this little family bond either, not to mention that this was just an alternate branching timeline.

At this moment, several black cars suddenly drove over from a distance. Those cars were so aggressive that they forced the cars next to them to give way. At the same time, Chen Chen saw several familiar figures in the car.

Seeing this scene, the corner of Chen Chen’s mouth suddenly curled up a cold smirk.

They had come after all...

chapters.title: Chapter 558: Although Chen Chen’S Body Has
chapters.body:
Chapter 558: Although Chen Chen’S Body Has

Chapter 558: Although Chen Chen’s Body Has

Under the dark sky, the aurora glimmered in various hues, joining with the neon lights in the city.

Chen Chen was like a lonely traveler. He was standing on the street in thin clothes, watching the cars approaching him.

“Whup-whup-whup...”

In the sky, there was also the faint sound of a helicopter hovering.

“It’s the Chen family’s motorcade...”

By the side of the road, several pedestrians saw five or six cars approaching under the street lights. They started talking in low voices, having noticed the stormy conflict that was brewing and walked away quickly.

“Creak!”

There was a series of harsh, rapid brake screeches in the street, and then all the cars opened their doors one after another.

“Boom!”

The doors of the car were slammed close and a dozen men or so wearing black tights and slack expressions immediately got out of the car and surrounded Chen Chen.

From the stretch car at their head, two young men with serious expressions also came out.

“Catch him alive, don’t endanger him yet.”

At the same moment the door of the stretch car closed, a somewhat old voice spoke. The two young men nodded their heads when they heard these words and walked straight to Chen Chen on the path formed by the bodyguards’ partition.

“Where’s Chen Zeyu?”

Chen Chen looked at the two calmly. “Are you also from the Chen family?”

“We are.”

One of the men who was tall and thin nodded. He looked at Chen Chen, a little bewildered. “Sir, we suspect there’s a spy from the Divine Fusion Empire in the city, please come with us.”

“Who are you, why did you ask about the founder of our Blacklight City?”

The other man was shorter and fatter. He asked in a cold voice, “Why are you here in Blacklight City?”

“Heh.”

Chen Chen looked around, then smiled. “Don’t you already know who I am?”

When they heard this, their expressions wavered. They observed Chen Chen carefully again. The tall and thin man found that Chen Chen’s eyes were not at all panicked. Having lived among the masses for so long, he knew that such a cool gaze definitely could not be faked...

Could it be that the other party was...

As if thinking of something, the tall and thin man kept silent. The short fat man beside him could no longer wait. He directly waved his hand fiercely and said to the people dressed in tight outfits beside him, “Black Knights, what are you waiting for? Take him away!”

However, the people around Chen Chen did not even move.

“You, you guys?”

The short fat man looked around the group of people questioningly but found that they seemed to have not heard his command and he whispered suddenly, “Is it because my authority isn’t enough? It can’t be, my father has transferred C-level authority to me...”

“Arrest them!”

However, just when they were mired in confusion, Chen Chen suddenly spoke.

The two quickly looked at Chen Chen, but they did not understand to whom Chen Chen was talking. The next second, a few pairs of big hands suddenly clapped on their backs. Before they had time to react, they were pressed to the ground by the group of men in tight clothes!

What was happening!!!

The tall and thin man and the short fat man looked fully stunned. Their heads were directly pressed to the cold floor. Up until now, they still had not figured out what happened.

“What are all of you doing!”

The short fat man exclaimed, “You dogs, are you betraying Blacklight City?”

Even so, he was destined to be disappointed because this group of people still wore slack faces as they overwhelmed the two young men. They did not display the slightest emotion from beginning to end.

Chen Chen ignored the two of them. He stepped directly over their bodies, walked to the side of the stretch car step by step, and knocked on the window of the car.

“Whirr...”

The car window was slowly winded down, revealing the face of a middle-aged man inside.

When he saw the other party, Chen Chen immediately grinned and smiled kindly. This person’s appearance was somewhat similar to his father’s.

He was indeed a Chen family member of pure blood.

The face of the man at the car window looked a bit displeased. Still, after all, he had held a high position for a long time. Although the situation had taken a few unexpected turns, he still maintained a certain calm demeanor. “What do you plan to do?”

“Are you asking me that?”

Chen Chen held the edge of the car window with one hand and asked with mock astonishment, “I was going to ask you myself, what do you guys plan to do?”

“...”

The middle-aged man fell silent for a while. He lowered his head while his eyes flickered.

However, at this moment, there was a sudden sound of a helicopter over their heads. The pilot who had hidden in the helicopter to prevent any mishaps fired a shot at Chen Chen!

“Bang!”

The gunfire exploded in the dark. At the same time, at the location of Chen Chen’s right temple, a huge warhead with the thickness of a finger was suspended in mid-air!

Chen Chen narrowed his eyes at once.

In the next second, one of the Black Knights suddenly turned around and took out his gun and decisively fired two shots at the helicopter overhead!

“Bang bang!”

Then, the helicopter lost control, swaying and dropping in mid-air!

“Boom!”

A huge red fireball erupted directly, blocking half of the road!

Looking at all of this, Chen Chen suddenly sneered and at the same time with a forceful grip, suddenly tore open half of the car door while he pulled the man out as if the man was some helpless little chick!

“Grandpa!”

The two men who were suppressed on the ground suddenly said in rage, “Let go of my grandpa!”

Chen Chen ignored them. He grinned icily. “Tell me, which generation of the Chen family do you come from?”

“I’m from the third generation of the Chen family, my name is Chen Zhicheng!”

The middle-aged man’s face was pale. He had lived like a prince all year round, only to be jerked about in such a humiliating manner. He only felt a burning on his face. “Chen... Calm down, we’re just confirming your identity. If you’re my grandfather’s brother, we’ll definitely arrange a proper place for you!”

“Arrange a place?”

Chen Chen dragged the man close to him, showing a puzzled and surprised look. “Are you kidding, the entire city is mine. You want to use what’s mine to arrange a place for me?”

“This, this isn’t yours, this is a city built by my grandfather!”

The middle-aged man quickly explained.

“I said this city is mine, this place is mine, and even your lives are mine!”

After saying this, Chen Chen suddenly turned around and he looked straight behind him. “Who is controlling the Black Knights, come out and face me!”

Hearing that, one of the tightly clad, slack-faced men suddenly quivered. He walked directly in front of Chen Chen, bowed, and said, “Sir Commander, I’m X-112. At the moment, the city’s defense authority and information authority are controlled by me.”

“You?”

Chen Chen’s voice was cold as frost. “Where’s X, where did she go?”

“Sir Commander, X, she...”

The Black Knight was silent for a moment. “She had been destroyed in the attack of the Consciousness Stealer. Because time was tight, before she died, she had only time to transmit me out and gave me the final order to assist the Chen family, to prevent the Chen family from being destroyed while waiting for your return!”

Chen Chen was silent for a while when he heard these words and then shook his head. “So, it’s like that...”

“Now that you’ve returned, I’ll return all the authority here to you.”

X-112 continued. “But I don’t have all the authority in Blacklight City. During these three hundred years, the Chen family tried to crack my modules. Now I have some modules controlled by the Chen family, so I couldn’t immediately dispatch the Black Knights here to greet you!”

“Crack your modules?”

Chen Chen frowned and then sneered. “Sure enough, it’s my dear little brother. It seems that he knew I wasn’t dead, so he had taken precautions long ago.”

Although this was a short exchange, it still stunned Chen Zhicheng and the two Chen members who were on the ground. Chen Zhicheng looked at the Black Knight in shock, because in his memory, these Black Knights would never communicate with him. X-112 was the same, it would only give feedback to the Chen family’s orders. For a long time, everyone thought that X-112 was just a computer with a limited amount of intelligence!

“Because Black Knights will also age, 90% of Black Knights are in a frozen state and will only be thawed if there is an emergency.”

X-112 continued to ask. “Sir Commander, do you need to defrost them now? Defrosting will take about an hour.”

“Defrost them all!”

Chen Chen replied as he dragged Chen Zhicheng into the car. “X-112, take me home now!”

“Yes!”

The Black Knight immediately obeyed. He went straight to the cab and sat inside. At the same time, the other Black Knights also escorted the two Chen men into another car and then the entire convoy immediately drove toward the Blacklight Building at the end of the road!

When the vehicle started, sirens suddenly broke out across the entire city while X-112 turned his head back. “Sir Commander, the other party has initiated the wartime state of Blacklight City. I couldn’t stop them. Now the city defense forces have been dispatched and are heading toward the Blacklight Building!”

“Can you reach the Blacklight Building before they arrive?”

“It’s difficult. They’re using gunship helicopters. This advanced troop will arrive at the Blacklight Building one step ahead of us.”

X-112 replied.

“Then let the Black Knights kill them!”

A cold gleam appeared in Chen Chen’s eyes. “Whoever wants to stand against me, I will give them what they want!”

“No!”

Chen Zhicheng hurriedly shouted in horror, “This will be the end of the Chen family...”

Before Chen Zhicheng finished speaking, he felt that he could not speak anymore. An invisible force blocked his throat. He quickly opened his mouth and tried to gulp in a mouthful of air, but he could not gulp anything.

It was like a mass of air had condensed into solid. No matter how he scrabbled, he could not make any sound.

Just as the convoy was about to arrive at the Blacklight Building, suddenly, a dozen helicopters flew in from all directions. Even so, these armed helicopters did not attack the convoy. Instead, they flew toward the Blacklight Building in a hurry. At the same time, there were bursts of fire in the Blacklight Building!

It seemed that people were already fighting fiercely inside the Blacklight Building!

“That’s the five remaining Black Knights in the Blacklight Building.”

X-112 immediately explained, “The rest of the Black Knights are thawing and now the five Black Knights have begun to attack the other armed personnel in the Blacklight Building indiscriminately, but because there are too few of them, they are about to be suppressed.”

Chen Chen waved his hand and the six cars stopped in front of the gate 100 meters away from the Blacklight Building. However, at this time, a group of soldiers with live ammunition had set up temporary fortifications and were guarding the gate.

“Sir Commander, the opponent is delaying our time, waiting for the arrival of the backup troops!”

X-112 continued to notify, “But they’re playing right into our hands because in half an hour, all the Black Knights will be thawed from the cryogenic chambers. They don’t know that I have the authority to unfreeze the Black Knights.”

“We don’t need to wait.”

Chen Chen got out of the car directly after hearing these words. He walked step by step toward the gate of the Blacklight Building. Immediately, hundreds of soldiers immediately raised their guns and aimed at Chen Chen and the Black Knights behind him.

Chen Chen narrowed his eyes, staring at the group of people in front of him, and suddenly said coldly, “Where’s Chen Zeyu, come out and face me!”

Although Chen Chen only used his ordinary voice, it was strange that this voice had a penetrating power. The farther it traveled, the louder the voice became.

“Come out and face me!”

“Come and face me!”

“Face me!”

Suddenly, there was a commotion in the crowd.

After a while, several people with somewhat aged faces but full of the aura of a superior, appeared in front of the army.

At their head was a middle-aged man with gray hair and a stormy expression, but what was strange was that his face and temperament were forty to fifty percent similar to Chen Chen!

Although he had never met this man, upon seeing him, Chen Chen suddenly had an intuition that this person was his brother.

“Sigh...”

The middle-aged man opened his eyes as wide as he could, let out a sigh, and shook his head at the same time. “You shouldn’t have come back!”

“Shouldn’t I have?”

Chen Chen’s mouth twitched in a sardonic smile and then the smile gradually expanded uncontrollably as if silent emotions were flowing and spreading in him. In the end, Chen Chen was guffawing toward the sky!

“Hahahahaha, it’s my dear little brother!”

Chen Chen rubbed his palms and laughed. “My dear brother, have you already chosen to stand against me? Very good, I like that very much! Then you must’ve prepared to bear the price of rebelling against me, right?”

“I won’t necessarily lose...”

Chen Zeyu gritted his teeth. At this moment, he suddenly felt an indescribable sense of suppression. This feeling permeated every inch within a radius of dozens of meters. In a while, some soldiers even started to tremble with guns in their hands.

“Father!”

“Grandpa...”

Next to him, several Chen family members who seemed to be of the same age stood out and shielded Chen Zeyu. They looked at each other, a little amazed. One of them whispered, “Is it psionics? Are the rumors true? He’s the first psionicist in the world? Impossible...”

“Let’s retreat first. All soldiers, get ready to open fire at once!”

Another person felt that the situation was turning bad and he immediately prepared to pull Chen Zeyu back.

At this moment, Chen Chen’s inner killing intent was completely ignited but at the same time, he suddenly felt the Field energy in his mind begin to emit a scorching sensation. He raised his hand to look at his palm with some puzzlement. At this moment, he sensed a weird power...

“So, is this the real use of psionics?”

Chen Chen murmured.

The killing intent became more and more potent, but Chen Chen’s mind was extremely clear as if he had taken NZT-48 and his thinking was incomparably calm.

Immediately, Chen Chen only felt that the Field energy that had fused with psionics was spreading throughout his body. He subconsciously condensed that power in his palm, only to find that this power had begun to temporarily alter his own DNA code!

“Splat!”

Before the horrified eyes of everyone, a sinister tentacle suddenly grew out of Chen Chen’s palm!

That was...

The tentacles that only the Consciousness Stealer had...

chapters.title: Chapter 559: The Heartwarming Backstory
chapters.body:
Chapter 559: The Heartwarming Backstory

Chapter 559: The Heartwarming Backstory

Before the horrified eyes of everyone, suddenly, a hideous and ugly tentacle grew out from Chen Chen’s palm.

Then, Chen Chen’s body began to swell rapidly and there was a sound of bone growing in his body. Chen Chen could not help bending down and bowing his body. Following that, there was a sharp “crack” and huge bone spurs sprouted out on Chen Chen’s back!

“Roar—!”

At the moment when those bone spurs erupted, Chen Chen only felt an extremely pleasant release. He roared in a low voice but his voice had turned into a dull bass boom. Still, although it was bass, it rumbled until many soldiers threw off their helmets and armor, and quickly covered their ears!

Chen Zeyu only felt the rumbling in his ears and his ears immediately overflowed with blood but before he could react, he was dragged back by a few bodyguards. At this moment, anyone could see that Chen Chen was not in a normal state!

“Rip!”

After that, there was the sound of cloth tearing. At this point, Chen Chen’s flexible skin was stretched to the extreme, tearing apart to expose the swelling and growing muscles inside!

However, Chen Chen’s skin began to heal at an even more alarming speed and at the same time, a thick bone layer emerged on the surface of the skin. This bone layer continued to grow across his body and even his face started to change!

The corners of Chen Chen’s mouth were pulled up in a beastly grin and the two rows of teeth that had been growing continuously became densely packed fangs. Moreover, the bone layer covered his cheeks like a mask!

“Huff! Huff! Huff!”

A bellows-like panting constantly erupted from Chen Chen’s chest and a trail of hot mist continued to spray out from Chen Chen’s nose and mouth. Chen Chen closed his eyes slightly. Everyone only saw that his hollow eye sockets were dark at first, then two scarlet pupils flared up like charcoal embers!

“Power, I feel endless power!”

Chen Chen straightened up again but at this time, his body had grown from 1.8 meters to 4 meters. He stretched his body wantonly and looked down with a grinning smile at the Chen family who was retreating quickly. “Isn’t it a little late to run now?”

With that, Chen Chen stepped off one foot.

“Boom!”

In an instant, Chen Chen rushed into the line of defense at a speed close to the speed of sound. Many soldiers could not react at all before they were flipped over by Chen Chen into the air. Blood streamed into the sky like a never-ending fountain!

At this moment, Chen Chen’s reaction speed had reached a terrifying extent. In front of him, the entire world seemed to be in slow motion. Even when he flung away dozens of soldiers, their faces had not even twisted into an expression of terror and the splashing blood seemed to be frozen in the sky!

Chen Chen stepped forward once again and he created ripples directly in the air. At this moment, the air seemed to become liquid. Chen Chen continued to flick at the soldiers on the right. The tentacle in his hand was like a whip, halving a group of soldiers at their waist!

Even so, the soldiers had not even aimed their muzzles at him!

This kind of speed and reactivity was already worlds apart from human beings...

Whether it was guns or swords, bullets or rocket launchers, they were all projectiles that were only moving at Chen Chen’s speed. He squatted and swiped again. More than a dozen soldiers were crushed to pieces. The line of defense built by sandbags was like paper and mud, and it could not hold back Chen Chen at all!

This was purely Chen Chen’s physical power!

However, Chen Chen discovered that after slicing open the bodies of the soldiers, the tentacles in his hand instinctively sucked up the blood of those soldiers. At the same time, a sense of satiation poured into Chen Chen’s body, replenishing part of Chen Chen’s body that had exhausted an immense amount of energy.

“This is...”

Chen Chen’s heart jolted.

However, at the next moment, several dish-shaped fighters suddenly flew out of the darkness at a height of 100 meters. In the fighters, those pilots had already locked onto Chen Chen’s figure.

“The target is in our camp. If we fire now, it will cause a lot of casualties to our army!”

Faced with the order from the higher-ups to immediately destroy the intruder, the pilot who was the captain replied immediately.

“Don’t worry about our troops, fire immediately. I repeat, fire immediately!”

However, the radio still gave the death order to fire.

Seeing this, a rueful look flashed in the captain pilot’s eyes and he resolutely said, “All formations listen to my order, fire immediately. I repeat, fire immediately!”

“Swoosh!”

In an instant, five missiles swaying with scarlet tail lights sped toward Chen Chen with lightning speed!

“Hmm?”

Chen Chen tilted his head, watching the missiles that were gradually moving toward him. He suddenly took a deep breath and at the same time, the Field in his mind burst out!

“Boom, boom, boom, boom, boom!!!”

In the next second, the ground in front of Chen Chen exploded as if there was a buried high explosive and next was the area further ahead. The concrete surface, weighing a thousand pounds, erupted endlessly in flying smithereens. If one looked down from above, one would see that the ground in front of Chen Chen was cracking outward continuously in a spreading fan shape. The aftershock of this explosion quickly moved forward. At the moment it came into contact with those missiles, all the missiles exploded directly in the air!

Even so, this was not the end. The invisible force continued to move forward. The five fighters did not even have time to react before they exploded and turned into five bright fireworks...

Only then did everyone react. They only saw that the ground in front of Chen Chen seemed to have been bombarded by cluster bombs. The invisible shockwave had even rushed into the sky, completely detonating the fighter planes hundreds of meters high!

“It’s not only my physical body, but my Field power has also been greatly enhanced. This power... Is it more than ten times stronger than my original form?”

Chen Chen looked at the palm of his hand in surprise and then once again set his eyes on the group of trembling soldiers. His charcoal-fiery eyes just scanned them once and the remaining soldiers knelt to the ground without thinking, and shakily put down the weapons in their hands.

“Surrender, we surrender!”

Rows of soldiers knelt down one after another, their spirits having been disintegrated by Chen Chen’s Earth-shattering power.

“Capture them!”

Seeing this, Chen Chen also stopped. He was not a bloodthirsty person. Since the opponent had stopped, he did not bother to continue slaughtering this group of troops who could not put up any resistance.

Following Chen Chen’s order, a dozen Black Knights immediately stepped forward and captured the hundreds of soldiers.

As Chen Chen walked back to X-112, X-112 could not help asking with some worry, “Sir Commander, why did you transform yourself again? Do you feel uncomfortable?”

“Uncomfortable?”

Chen Chen cracked his neck and laughed in a low voice like a bellows. “I’ve never felt better.”

Seeing this, X-112 stopped asking. He turned to look at the Blacklight Building. “Chen Zeyu has led most of the Chen family to escape back into the Blacklight Building, but don’t worry, our Black Knights are waking up so they can’t run away. Now, what I’m worried about is the military camp a dozen kilometers away from Blacklight City. Currently, the first batch of reinforcements has been defeated, but at least 50,000 troops are on the way. Can your power defeat them?”

“It’s just fifty thousand troops from the Second World War. I can’t be bothered with these people.”

Chen Chen stretched out a fist and squeezed it slightly. “But what about our memetic weapons? Does the other party have such power?”

“Don’t worry, Sir Commander.”

X-112 immediately replied, “X wouldn’t possibly allow anyone other than you to own this deadly weapon. What’s more, even if you give it to them, they will not have the conditions for research. Those memetic weapons have all been transferred to Mars and there’s none of that left on the Earth.”

“Very well.”

Hearing this, Chen Chen nodded. He thought for a while. Suddenly, a cloud of mist hissed out over his body and then his body shrank again. In just the blink of an eye, Chen Chen’s body had shrunk to the size of an ordinary person and he had recovered his previous appearance.

“As I thought...”

Chen Chen looked at himself and he found that he had not become skinny as he would have previously. There was just a slight sense of weakness. This inference immediately made Chen Chen’s heart leap with joy.

“It turns out that since the last injection, the G-virus has remained in my body. Now when it encounters the psionic activation of the Consciousness Stealer, such a huge reaction is produced...”

At this point, Chen Chen understood almost everything.

Consciousness Stealers could be reborn. In addition to infecting human consciousness and turning them into its nourishment, it had the ability to also fuse human bodies.

This ability naturally came with the so-called psionic energy, which was a weird power that could alter the DNA code.

Therefore, after Chen Chen’s Field energy and psionic energy were merged, his Field energy also began to show psionic traits. This ability allowed him to re-optimize his DNA and turned him into the form that had been injected with G-virus.

Those tentacles were the power of the Consciousness Stealer that Chen Chen had stripped away. This power allowed him to continuously absorb nutrients and replenish the nutrients in his body.

Therefore, Chen Chen remained in his previous state even after he changed back into his own form, instead of being weakened for more than a month like when he was injected with G-virus.

Even his Field had been greatly enhanced.

Nonetheless, what surprised Chen Chen was that this state could be activated at any time. As long as he absorbed enough nutrients during the battle, he could quickly make up for it.

The only flaw was that Chen Chen was becoming farther and farther away from being a human.

“Find me a shirt first.”

Chen Chen said with an icy expression, “After half an hour, I want to see the Blacklight Building reopen, understand?”

“Yes!”

...

Half an hour later, before the reinforcements of Blacklight City arrived, a new melee broke out in the Blacklight Building. This melee occurred extremely abruptly and even the group of prisoners were stunned.

Nevertheless, this battle lasted only about ten minutes. The gate of the Blacklight Building that had been closed was now reopened. At the same time, teams of Black Knights rushed out and beside them, the beaten-down Chen family was detained.

Among these people, Chen Lin and Chen Zeyu were all included.

Looking at these dejected Chen family members, Chen Chen seemed to be looking at strangers. At the same time, some Chen family members were already spinning their brains, thinking of ways to win Chen Chen’s favor.

After all, seeing that Chen Chen did not even do anything to Chen Zhicheng and his two subordinates, all of whom had offended him, a seed of hope had sprouted in some of their hearts.

It seemed that Blacklight City was about to undergo a major reshuffle...

“Sir Commander!”

The Black Knight stepped forward again and X-112 reported, “I’ve regained all the authority of Blacklight City including the authority of the army. All the troops have been ordered to retreat and return, and those high-level Chen family members who didn’t obey the military order have also been arrested by their own adjutants. They can be sent to Blacklight City tomorrow.”

“Very good.”

Chen Chen nodded stoically. He walked slowly to Chen Zeyu and stared at this younger brother who was closest to his bloodline.

Chen Zeyu slowly lowered his head, afraid to look at Chen Chen’s eyes.

“Where are Mom and Dad?”

Suddenly, Chen Chen asked in a low voice, “Where did Mom and Dad go in the year of the Great Fusion?”

“They died.”

Chen Zeyu shook his head, looking numb. “The Consciousness Stealer overturned the entire Eco Science City and our parents died almost at once.”

Hearing these words, Chen Chen could not help taking a deep breath.

Although this was just another timeline where he existed, it did not mean that this was not the real world. This world was not any different from his reality, except for its history.

At this time, hearing the news of the death of his parents in this world, Chen Chen’s thoughts suddenly became a little complicated.

Chen Chen could not tell what kind of feeling it was. It felt like gladness, rage, and remorse.

Chen Chen was glad that in his original world, his parents were still alive and he had defeated the Consciousness Stealer, which meant that his parents could live a long, long time. With the development of Blacklight Biotechnology, his parents could live even longer.

Thinking of this, Chen Chen took a deep breath. He looked at Chen Zeyu as if he was looking at a dead man. “Very well...”

Chen Chen nodded, turned, and walked toward the Blacklight Building.
